Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**************************************************************************************************

  Endomorphism Theory

  Algebraic theories and λ-theories describe objects with "variables" and a substitution operation.
  An important class of examples are the so-called "endomorphism theories". Given an object X in a
  category with products, the endomorphism theory of X is the algebraic theory T with T(n) the set
  of morphisms from X^n to X with the projections as variables, where substitution of
  g1, …, gm: X^n → X into f: X^m → X creates the composite morphism X^n → X^m → X.
  One of the places where the endomorphism theory shows up, is in Scott's representation theorem,
  which shows that every model for the λ-calculus arises as the endomorphism theory of some object
  in some category.
  If X is also exponentiable and we have morphisms between X and X^X, we can turn X into a lambda
  theory.

  Now, given categories C and C', with chosen objects X and X', if a functor F: C → C' sends X to X'
  and preserves the binary product and terminal element, we obtain a λ-theory morphism between the
  endomorphism theories.

  Contents
  1. The definition of the endomorphism algebraic theory [endomorphism_theory]
  2. The definition of the endomorphism λ-theory [endomorphism_lambda_theory]
  3. A characterization of the endomorphism theories with β-equality [endomorphism_theory_has_β]
  4. A characterization of the endomorphism theories with η-equality [endomorphism_theory_has_eta]
  5. The endomorphism theory of a set [set_endomorphism_theory]
  6. The morphism between endomorphism theories [functor_to_lambda_theory_morphism]

 **************************************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.Limits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.exponentials.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Preservation.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Products.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Terminal.
Require Import UniMath.Combinatorics.StandardFiniteSets.
Require Import UniMath.Combinatorics.Tuples.

Require Import UniMath.AlgebraicTheories.AlgebraicTheories.
Require Import UniMath.AlgebraicTheories.AlgebraicTheoryMorphisms.
Require Import UniMath.AlgebraicTheories.LambdaTheories.
Require Import UniMath.AlgebraicTheories.LambdaTheoryMorphisms.
Require Import UniMath.AlgebraicTheories.ReflexiveObjects.

Local Open Scope cat.

(** * 1. The definition of the endomorphism algebraic theory *)

Section EndomorphismTheory.

  Context {C : category}.
  Context (C_terminal : Terminal C).
  Context (C_bin_products : BinProducts C).

  Variable (X : C).

  Let power
    (n : nat)
    : Product (stn n) C (λ _, X)
    := bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products n.

  
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
algebraic_theory_data

  
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
algebraic_theory_data

    
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
ℕ → hSet
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
∏ (n : ℕ) (i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
AlgebraicTheoryCategoryCore.var_ax ?T n i
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
∏ (m n : ℕ) (f : ?T m) 
(g : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → ?T n),
AlgebraicTheoryCategoryCore.subst_ax ?T m n f g

    
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
ℕ → hSet
 
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
n: ℕ
hSet

      exact (homset (power n) X).
    
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
∏ (n : ℕ) (i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
AlgebraicTheoryCategoryCore.var_ax
  (λ n0 : ℕ, homset (power n0) X) n i
 
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
n: ℕ
∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
AlgebraicTheoryCategoryCore.var_ax
  (λ n : ℕ, homset (power n) X) n i

      apply ProductPr.
    
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
∏ (m n : ℕ) (f : (λ n0 : ℕ, homset (power n0) X) m)
(g : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (λ n0 : ℕ, homset (power n0) X) n),
AlgebraicTheoryCategoryCore.subst_ax
  (λ n0 : ℕ, homset (power n0) X) m n f g
 
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
m, n: ℕ
f: (λ n : ℕ, homset (power n) X) m
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → (λ n : ℕ, homset (power n) X) n
AlgebraicTheoryCategoryCore.subst_ax
  (λ n : ℕ, homset (power n) X) m n f g

      exact (f ∘ (ProductArrow _ _ _ g)).
  Defined.

  
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
is_algebraic_theory endomorphism_theory_data

bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,

is_algebraic_theory endomorphism_theory_data

C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
∏ (l m n : ℕ) (f_l : endomorphism_theory_data l)
(f_m : (⟦ l ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_theory_data m)
(f_n : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_theory_data n),
subst_subst_ax endomorphism_theory_data l m n f_l f_m
  f_n

∏ (m n : ℕ) (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
(f : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_theory_data n),
var_subst_ax endomorphism_theory_data m n i f

  n: ∏ n : ℕ,

∏ (n : ℕ) (f : endomorphism_theory_data n),
subst_var_ax endomorphism_theory_data n f

C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C

bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
∏ (l m n : ℕ) (f_l : endomorphism_theory_data l)
(f_m : (⟦ l ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_theory_data m)
(f_n : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_theory_data n),
subst_subst_ax endomorphism_theory_data l m n f_l f_m
  f_n
 
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
l, m, n: ℕ
f_l: endomorphism_theory_data l
f_m: (⟦ l ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_theory_data m
f_n: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_theory_data n
subst_subst_ax endomorphism_theory_data l m n f_l f_m
  f_n

      
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
l, m, n: ℕ
f_l: endomorphism_theory_data l
f_m: (⟦ l ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_theory_data m
f_n: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_theory_data n
subst (subst f_l f_m) f_n =
subst f_l (λ t_l : (⟦ l ⟧)%stn, subst (f_m t_l) f_n)

      
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
l, m, n: ℕ
f_l: endomorphism_theory_data l
f_m: (⟦ l ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_theory_data m
f_n: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_theory_data n
ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) f_n
· ProductArrow (⟦ l ⟧)%stn C (power l) f_m · f_l =
subst f_l (λ t_l : (⟦ l ⟧)%stn, subst (f_m t_l) f_n)

      
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
l, m, n: ℕ
f_l: endomorphism_theory_data l
f_m: (⟦ l ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_theory_data m
f_n: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_theory_data n
ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) f_n
· ProductArrow (⟦ l ⟧)%stn C (power l) f_m =
ProductArrow (⟦ l ⟧)%stn C (power l)
  (λ t_l : (⟦ l ⟧)%stn, subst (f_m t_l) f_n)

      
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
l, m, n: ℕ
f_l: endomorphism_theory_data l
f_m: (⟦ l ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_theory_data m
f_n: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_theory_data n
ProductArrow (⟦ l ⟧)%stn C (power l)
  (λ i : (⟦ l ⟧)%stn,
   ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) f_n
   · ProductArrow (⟦ l ⟧)%stn C (power l) f_m
   · ProductPr (⟦ l ⟧)%stn C (power l) i) =
ProductArrow (⟦ l ⟧)%stn C (power l)
  (λ t_l : (⟦ l ⟧)%stn, subst (f_m t_l) f_n)

      
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
l, m, n: ℕ
f_l: endomorphism_theory_data l
f_m: (⟦ l ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_theory_data m
f_n: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_theory_data n
(λ i : (⟦ l ⟧)%stn,
 ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) f_n
 · ProductArrow (⟦ l ⟧)%stn C (power l) f_m
 · ProductPr (⟦ l ⟧)%stn C (power l) i) ~
(λ t_l : (⟦ l ⟧)%stn, subst (f_m t_l) f_n)

      
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
l, m, n: ℕ
f_l: endomorphism_theory_data l
f_m: (⟦ l ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_theory_data m
f_n: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_theory_data n
x: (⟦ l ⟧)%stn
ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) f_n
· ProductArrow (⟦ l ⟧)%stn C (power l) f_m
· ProductPr (⟦ l ⟧)%stn C (power l) x =
subst (f_m x) f_n

      
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
l, m, n: ℕ
f_l: endomorphism_theory_data l
f_m: (⟦ l ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_theory_data m
f_n: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_theory_data n
x: (⟦ l ⟧)%stn
ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) f_n
· (ProductArrow (⟦ l ⟧)%stn C (power l) f_m
   · ProductPr (⟦ l ⟧)%stn C (power l) x) =
subst (f_m x) f_n

      
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
l, m, n: ℕ
f_l: endomorphism_theory_data l
f_m: (⟦ l ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_theory_data m
f_n: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_theory_data n
x: (⟦ l ⟧)%stn
ProductArrow (⟦ l ⟧)%stn C (power l) f_m
· ProductPr (⟦ l ⟧)%stn C (power l) x = f_m x

      exact (ProductPrCommutes _ _ _ _ _ _ _).
    
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
∏ (m n : ℕ) (i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn)
(f : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_theory_data n),
var_subst_ax endomorphism_theory_data m n i f
 
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
m, n: ℕ
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
f: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_theory_data n
var_subst_ax endomorphism_theory_data m n i f

      exact (ProductPrCommutes _ _ _ _ _ _ _).
    
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
∏ (n : ℕ) (f : endomorphism_theory_data n),
subst_var_ax endomorphism_theory_data n f
 
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_theory_data n
subst_var_ax endomorphism_theory_data n f

      
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_theory_data n
subst f var = f

      
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_theory_data n
subst f var = identity (power n) · f

      
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_theory_data n
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) var =
identity (power n)

      
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_theory_data n
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) var =
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n)
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
   identity (power n)
   · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i)

      
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_theory_data n
var ~
(λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
 identity (power n)
 · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i)

      
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_theory_data n
x: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
var x =
identity (power n)
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) x

      exact (!id_left _).
  Qed.

  Definition endomorphism_theory : algebraic_theory
    := make_algebraic_theory _ endomorphism_is_theory.

  (** * 2. The definition of the endomorphism λ-theory *)

  Let pow_commutes (n : nat) (c : C) (f : stn n → C⟦c, X⟧) (i : stn n)
    : ProductArrow _ _ (power n) f · ProductPr _ _ (power n) i = f i
    := (ProductPrCommutes _ _ _ (power n)) c f i.

  Let bp_commutes_1 (n : nat) (c : C) (f : C⟦c, power n⟧) (g : C⟦c, X⟧)
    : BinProductArrow _ (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g · BinProductPr1 _ _ = f
    := BinProductPr1Commutes _ _ _ (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g.

  Let bp_commutes_2 (n : nat) (c : C) (f : C⟦c, power n⟧) (g : C⟦c, X⟧)
    : BinProductArrow _ (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g · BinProductPr2 _ _ = g
    := BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g.

  Context (E : is_exponentiable C_bin_products X).

  Context (abs : C⟦exp E X, X⟧).
  Context (app : C⟦X, exp E X⟧).

  
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
lambda_theory_data

  
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
lambda_theory_data

    
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C

X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,

  n: ∏ n : ℕ,

ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C

(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X

(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C

bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),

  (power n) X

(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),

· BinProductPr2 C

abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧

  n: ∏ n : ℕ,

ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =

  n: ∏ n : ℕ,

(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =

C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)

(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C

bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),

· BinProductPr2 C

abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
algebraic_theory
 exact endomorphism_theory.
    
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)

(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i

(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X

(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),

  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C

abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
∏ (n : ℕ) (f : endomorphism_theory n),
LambdaTheoryCategoryCore.app_ax endomorphism_theory n
  f
 
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_theory n
LambdaTheoryCategoryCore.app_ax endomorphism_theory n
  f

      exact (exp_app_alt E (f · app)).

C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,

(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)

f i

(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)

· BinProductPr2 C

LambdaTheoryCategoryCore.abs_ax endomorphism_theory n
  f
 
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),

  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_theory (S n)
LambdaTheoryCategoryCore.abs_ax endomorphism_theory n
  f

      exact (exp_lam_alt E f · abs).
  Defined.

  
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
is_lambda_theory endomorphism_lambda_theory_data

  
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
is_lambda_theory endomorphism_lambda_theory_data

    
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)

(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X

(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C

bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)

  (power n) X

(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C

E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
∏ (m n : ℕ) (f : endomorphism_lambda_theory_data m)
(g : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n),
app_subst_ax endomorphism_lambda_theory_data m n f g

(f : endomorphism_lambda_theory_data (S m))
(g : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n),
abs_subst_ax endomorphism_lambda_theory_data m n f g

C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data m
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
exp_app_alt E
  (ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) g · (f · app)) =
extended_composition (appx f) g

      
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data m
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
# (constprod_functor2 C_bin_products X)
  (ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) g)
· φ_adj_inv
    (pr2
       (is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable'
          C_bin_products X E)) (f · app) =
extended_composition (appx f) g

      
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data m
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
# (constprod_functor2 C_bin_products X)
  (ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) g) =
ProductArrow (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn C (power (S m))
  (extend_tuple (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, inflate (g i))
     (var (stnweq (inr tt))))

C_terminal: Terminal C

X: C

f i

(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data m
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
# (constprod_functor2 C_bin_products X)
  (ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) g)
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (functor_identity C (power m))
       (constant_functor C C X (power m))) =
ProductArrow (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn C (power (S m))
  (extend_tuple (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, inflate (g i))
     (var (stnweq (inr tt))))
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (functor_identity C (power m))
       (constant_functor C C X (power m)))
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g

abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data m
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
# (constprod_functor2 C_bin_products X)
  (ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) g)
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (functor_identity C (power m))
       (constant_functor C C X (power m))) =
ProductArrow (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn C 
  (power (S m))
  (extend_tuple (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, inflate (g i))
     (var (stnweq (inr tt))))

C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)

(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C

(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X

  (ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) g)

    (C_bin_products (functor_identity C (power m))

  (extend_tuple (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, inflate (g i))

C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data m
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
BinProductPr1 C
  (C_bin_products
     (functor_identity C
        (pr11 ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                    Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                  match
                    n as n0
                    return
                      (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
                  with
                  | 0 =>
                      Terminal_is_empty_product
                        C_terminal
                        (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                        weqstn0toempty
                  | S n0 =>
                      n_power_to_sn_power
                        C_bin_products (F n0)
                  end) n)))
     (constant_functor C C X
        (pr11 ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                    Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                  match
                    n as n0
                    return
                      (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
                  with
                  | 0 =>
                      Terminal_is_empty_product
                        C_terminal
                        (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                        weqstn0toempty
                  | S n0 =>
                      n_power_to_sn_power
                        C_bin_products (F n0)
                  end) n))))
· # (functor_identity C)
    (ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) g) =
ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C
  ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
        Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
      match
        n as n0
        return
          (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
             (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
      with
      | 0 =>
          Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
            (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty
      | S n0 =>
          n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products (F n0)
      end) m)
  (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   extend_tuple (λ i0 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, inflate (g i0))
     (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
     (weqdnicoprod m lastelement (inl i)))

        
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data m
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
∏ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
BinProductPr1 C
  (C_bin_products
     (functor_identity C
        (pr11 ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                    Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                  match
                    n as n0
                    return
                      (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
                  with
                  | 0 =>
                      Terminal_is_empty_product
                        C_terminal
                        (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                        weqstn0toempty
                  | S n0 =>
                      n_power_to_sn_power
                        C_bin_products (F n0)
                  end) n)))
     (constant_functor C C X
        (pr11 ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                    Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                  match
                    n as n0
                    return
                      (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
                  with
                  | 0 =>
                      Terminal_is_empty_product
                        C_terminal
                        (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                        weqstn0toempty
                  | S n0 =>
                      n_power_to_sn_power
                        C_bin_products (F n0)
                  end) n))))
· # (functor_identity C)
    (ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) g)
· ProductPr (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) i =
ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C
  ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
        Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
      match
        n as n0
        return
          (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
             (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
      with
      | 0 =>
          Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
            (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty
      | S n0 =>
          n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products (F n0)
      end) m)
  (λ i0 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   extend_tuple (λ i1 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, inflate (g i1))
     (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
     (weqdnicoprod m lastelement (inl i0)))
· ProductPr (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) i

C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)

(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X

(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),

  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)

(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)

f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data m
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
BinProductPr1 C
  (C_bin_products
     (functor_identity C
        (pr11 ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                    Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                  match
                    n as n0
                    return
                      (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
                  with
                  | 0 =>
                      Terminal_is_empty_product

                        weqstn0toempty
                  | S n0 =>
                      n_power_to_sn_power
                        C_bin_products (F n0)

     (constant_functor C C X
        (pr11 ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                    Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                  match
                    n as n0
                    return
                      (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
                  with
                  | 0 =>
                      Terminal_is_empty_product
                        C_terminal
                        (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                        weqstn0toempty
                  | S n0 =>
                      n_power_to_sn_power
                        C_bin_products (F n0)
                  end) n))))
· # (functor_identity C)
    (ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) g)
· ProductPr (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) i =
ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C
  ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
        Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
      match
        n as n0
        return
          (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C

      with
      | 0 =>
          Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
            (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty
      | S n0 =>
          n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products (F n0)
      end) m)
  (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   extend_tuple (λ i0 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, inflate (g i0))
     (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
     (weqdnicoprod m lastelement (inl i)))
· ProductPr (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) i

        
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data m
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
BinProductPr1 C
  (C_bin_products
     (functor_identity C
        (pr11 ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                    Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                  match
                    n as n0
                    return
                      (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
                  with
                  | 0 =>
                      Terminal_is_empty_product
                        C_terminal
                        (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                        weqstn0toempty
                  | S n0 =>
                      n_power_to_sn_power
                        C_bin_products (F n0)
                  end) n)))
     (constant_functor C C X
        (pr11 ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                    Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                  match
                    n as n0
                    return
                      (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
                  with
                  | 0 =>
                      Terminal_is_empty_product
                        C_terminal
                        (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                        weqstn0toempty
                  | S n0 =>
                      n_power_to_sn_power
                        C_bin_products (F n0)
                  end) n))))
· (# (functor_identity C)
     (ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) g)
   · ProductPr (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) i) =
ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C
  ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
        Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
      match
        n as n0
        return
          (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
             (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
      with
      | 0 =>
          Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
            (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty
      | S n0 =>
          n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products (F n0)
      end) m)
  (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   extend_tuple (λ i0 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, inflate (g i0))
     (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
     (weqdnicoprod m lastelement (inl i)))
· ProductPr (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) i

        
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data m
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C
  ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
        Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
      match
        n as n0
        return
          (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
             (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
      with
      | 0 =>
          Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
            (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty
      | S n0 =>
          n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products (F n0)
      end) m)
  (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   extend_tuple (λ i0 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, inflate (g i0))
     (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
     (weqdnicoprod m lastelement (inl i)))
· ProductPr (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) i =
BinProductPr1 C
  (C_bin_products
     (functor_identity C
        (pr11 ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                    Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                  match
                    n as n0
                    return
                      (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
                  with
                  | 0 =>
                      Terminal_is_empty_product
                        C_terminal
                        (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                        weqstn0toempty
                  | S n0 =>
                      n_power_to_sn_power
                        C_bin_products (F n0)
                  end) n)))
     (constant_functor C C X
        (pr11 ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                    Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                  match
                    n as n0
                    return
                      (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
                  with
                  | 0 =>
                      Terminal_is_empty_product
                        C_terminal
                        (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                        weqstn0toempty
                  | S n0 =>
                      n_power_to_sn_power
                        C_bin_products (F n0)
                  end) n)))) · g i

        
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),

  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data m
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
extend_tuple (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, inflate (g i))
  (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
  (weqdnicoprod m lastelement (inl i)) =
BinProductPr1 C
  (C_bin_products
     (functor_identity C
        (pr11 ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                    Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                  match
                    n as n0
                    return
                      (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
                  with
                  | 0 =>
                      Terminal_is_empty_product
                        C_terminal
                        (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                        weqstn0toempty
                  | S n0 =>
                      n_power_to_sn_power
                        C_bin_products (F n0)
                  end) n)))
     (constant_functor C C X
        (pr11 ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                    Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                  match
                    n as n0
                    return
                      (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
                  with
                  | 0 =>
                      Terminal_is_empty_product
                        C_terminal
                        (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                        weqstn0toempty
                  | S n0 =>
                      n_power_to_sn_power
                        C_bin_products (F n0)
                  end) n)))) · g i

  n: ∏ n : ℕ,

f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data m
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
inflate (g i) =
BinProductPr1 C
  (C_bin_products
     (functor_identity C
        (pr11 ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                    Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                  match
                    n as n0

                      (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))

                  | 0 =>
                      Terminal_is_empty_product

                        (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                        weqstn0toempty
                  | S n0 =>
                      n_power_to_sn_power
                        C_bin_products (F n0)
                  end) n)))
     (constant_functor C C X
        (pr11 ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                    Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                  match
                    n as n0
                    return
                      (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
                  with
                  | 0 =>
                      Terminal_is_empty_product
                        C_terminal
                        (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                        weqstn0toempty
                  | S n0 =>
                      n_power_to_sn_power
                        C_bin_products (F n0)
                  end) n)))) · g i

  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))) =

C_terminal: Terminal C

  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)

f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data m
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n)
  (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i0)))
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
BinProductPr1 C
  (C_bin_products
     (functor_identity C
        (pr11 ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                    Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                  match

                  match
                    n as n0

                         (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
                  with

                        C_terminal

                        weqstn0toempty
                  | S n0 =>
                      n_power_to_sn_power
                        C_bin_products (F n0)
                  end) n))))
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i

        
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data m
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n)
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i)))
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) j =
BinProductPr1 C
  (C_bin_products
     (functor_identity C
        (pr11 ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                    Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                  match
                    n as n0
                    return
                      (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
                  with
                  | 0 =>
                      Terminal_is_empty_product
                        C_terminal
                        (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                        weqstn0toempty
                  | S n0 =>
                      n_power_to_sn_power
                        C_bin_products (F n0)
                  end) n)))
     (constant_functor C C X
        (pr11 ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                    Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                  match
                    n as n0
                    return
                      (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
                  with
                  | 0 =>
                      Terminal_is_empty_product
                        C_terminal
                        (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                        weqstn0toempty
                  | S n0 =>
                      n_power_to_sn_power
                        C_bin_products (F n0)
                  end) n))))
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) j

        
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data m
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
var (stnweq (inl j)) =
BinProductPr1 C
  (C_bin_products
     (functor_identity C
        (pr11 ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                    Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                  match
                    n as n0
                    return
                      (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
                  with
                  | 0 =>
                      Terminal_is_empty_product
                        C_terminal
                        (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                        weqstn0toempty
                  | S n0 =>
                      n_power_to_sn_power
                        C_bin_products (F n0)
                  end) n)))
     (constant_functor C C X
        (pr11 ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                    Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                  match
                    n as n0
                    return
                      (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
                  with
                  | 0 =>
                      Terminal_is_empty_product
                        C_terminal
                        (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                        weqstn0toempty
                  | S n0 =>
                      n_power_to_sn_power
                        C_bin_products (F n0)
                  end) n))))
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) j

        exact (maponpaths _ (homotinvweqweq _ (inl j))).
      
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data m
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
# (constprod_functor2 C_bin_products X)
  (ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) g)
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (functor_identity C (power m))
       (constant_functor C C X (power m))) =
ProductArrow (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn C (power (S m))
  (extend_tuple (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, inflate (g i))
     (var (stnweq (inr tt))))
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (functor_identity C (power m))
       (constant_functor C C X (power m)))
 
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)

(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),

  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i

(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)

BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X

  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C

(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)

  (power n) X

E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data m
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
BinProductPr2 C
  (C_bin_products
     (functor_identity C
        (pr11 ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                    Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                  match
                    n as n0
                    return
                      (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
                  with
                  | 0 =>
                      Terminal_is_empty_product
                        C_terminal
                        (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                        weqstn0toempty
                  | S n0 =>
                      n_power_to_sn_power
                        C_bin_products (F n0)
                  end) n)))
     (constant_functor C C X
        (pr11 ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                    Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                  match
                    n as n0
                    return
                      (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
                  with
                  | 0 =>
                      Terminal_is_empty_product
                        C_terminal
                        (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                        weqstn0toempty
                  | S n0 =>
                      n_power_to_sn_power
                        C_bin_products (F n0)
                  end) n))))
· # (constant_functor C C X)
    (ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) g) =
ProductArrow (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn C (power (S m))
  (extend_tuple (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, inflate (g i))
     (var (stnweq (inr tt))))
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (functor_identity C (power m))
       (constant_functor C C X (power m)))

C_terminal: Terminal C

X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,

  n: ∏ n : ℕ,

ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i

· BinProductPr1 C

app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧

f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data m
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
extend_tuple (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, inflate (g i))
  (var (stnweq (inr tt)))
  (weqdnicoprod m lastelement (inr tt)) =
BinProductPr2 C
  (C_bin_products
     (functor_identity C
        (pr11 ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                    Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                  match
                    n as n0

                      (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C

                        C_terminal

                  | S n0 =>
                      n_power_to_sn_power

                  end) n)))
     (constant_functor C C X

                  match
                    n as n0

                      (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
                  with
                  | 0 =>
                      Terminal_is_empty_product
                        C_terminal
                        (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                        weqstn0toempty
                  | S n0 =>
                      n_power_to_sn_power
                        C_bin_products (F n0)
                  end) n))))

BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data m
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
var (stnweq (inr tt)) =
BinProductPr2 C
  (C_bin_products
     (functor_identity C
        (pr11 ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                    Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                  match
                    n as n0
                    return
                      (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
                  with
                  | 0 =>
                      Terminal_is_empty_product
                        C_terminal
                        (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                        weqstn0toempty
                  | S n0 =>
                      n_power_to_sn_power
                        C_bin_products (F n0)
                  end) n)))
     (constant_functor C C X
        (pr11 ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                    Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                  match
                    n as n0
                    return
                      (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
                  with
                  | 0 =>
                      Terminal_is_empty_product
                        C_terminal
                        (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                        weqstn0toempty
                  | S n0 =>
                      n_power_to_sn_power
                        C_bin_products (F n0)
                  end) n))))

        exact (maponpaths _ (homotinvweqweq _ (inr tt))).
    
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
∏ (m n : ℕ)
(f : endomorphism_lambda_theory_data (S m))
(g : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n),
abs_subst_ax endomorphism_lambda_theory_data m n f g

(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C

  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)

C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,

  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)

(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),

  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)

app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data (S m)
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
LambdaTheories.abs (extended_composition f g) =
ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) g
· exp_lam_alt E f · abs

      
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),

  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data (S m)
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
LambdaTheories.abs (extended_composition f g) =
φ_adj
  (pr2
     (is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable'
        C_bin_products X E))
  (# (constprod_functor2 C_bin_products X)
     (ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) g) · f)
· abs

      
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data (S m)
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
ProductArrow (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn C (power (S m))
  (extend_tuple (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, inflate (g i))
     (var (stnweq (inr tt)))) =
# (constprod_functor2 C_bin_products X)
  (ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) g)

      
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),

  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C

bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),

app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data (S m)
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
∏ i : (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn,
ProductArrow (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn C (power (S m))
  (extend_tuple (λ i0 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, inflate (g i0))
     (var (stnweq (inr tt))))
· ProductPr (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn C (power (S m)) i =
# (constprod_functor2 C_bin_products X)
  (ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) g)
· ProductPr (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn C (power (S m)) i

  (extend_tuple (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, inflate (g i))
     (var (stnweq (inr tt))))
· ProductPr (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn C (power (S m)) i =
