C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data (S m)
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
i: (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn
# (constprod_functor2 C_bin_products X)
  (ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) g)
· ProductPr (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn C (power (S m))
    (stnweq (invmap stnweq i)) =
extend_tuple (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, inflate (g i))
  (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (invmap stnweq i))

      
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data (S m)
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
i: (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
# (constprod_functor2 C_bin_products X)
  (ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) g)
· coprod_rect
    (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
     C
     ⟦ sn_power_object C_bin_products
         ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
               Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                 (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
             match
               n as n0
               return
                 (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                    (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
             with
             | 0 =>
                 Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                   (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                   weqstn0toempty
             | S n0 =>
                 n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                   (F n0)
             end) m), X ⟧)
    (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
     BinProductPr1 C
       (C_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) m) X)
     · ProductPr (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C
         ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
               Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                 (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
             match
               n as n0
               return
                 (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                    (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
             with
             | 0 =>
                 Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                   (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                   weqstn0toempty
             | S n0 =>
                 n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                   (F n0)
             end) m) i')
    (λ _ : unit,
     BinProductPr2 C
       (C_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) m) X)) (inl i') =
extend_tuple (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, inflate (g i))
  (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inl i'))
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)

(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i

(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X

(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C

bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)

abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data (S m)
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
i: (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn
i': unit
# (constprod_functor2 C_bin_products X)
  (ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) g)
· coprod_rect
    (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
     C
     ⟦ sn_power_object C_bin_products
         ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
               Product 
                 (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C 
                 (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
             match
               n as n0
               return
                 (Product 
                    (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                    (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
             with
             | 0 =>
                 Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                   (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                   weqstn0toempty
             | S n0 =>
                 n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                   (F n0)
             end) m), X ⟧)
    (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
     BinProductPr1 C
       (C_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product 
                  (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C 
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product 
                     (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) m) X)
     · ProductPr (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C
         ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
               Product 
                 (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C 
                 (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
             match
               n as n0
               return
                 (Product 
                    (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                    (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
             with
             | 0 =>
                 Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                   (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                   weqstn0toempty
             | S n0 =>
                 n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                   (F n0)
             end) m) i')
    (λ _ : unit,
     BinProductPr2 C
       (C_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product 
                  (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C 
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product 
                     (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) m) X)) 
    (inr i') =
extend_tuple (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, inflate (g i))
  (var (stnweq (inr tt))) 
  (stnweq (inr i'))

      
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i

(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X

(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)

· BinProductPr1 C

  (power n) X

g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
i: (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
# (constprod_functor2 C_bin_products X)
  (ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) g)
· coprod_rect
    (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
     C
     ⟦ sn_power_object C_bin_products
         ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
               Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                 (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
             match
               n as n0
               return

                    (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
             with
             | 0 =>
                 Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                   (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                   weqstn0toempty
             | S n0 =>
                 n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                   (F n0)

    (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
     BinProductPr1 C
       (C_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C

              match
                n as n0

              | 0 =>

                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) m) X)
     · ProductPr (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C
         ((fix F (n : ℕ) :

                 (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
             match
               n as n0

                    (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))

             | 0 =>
                 Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal

                   weqstn0toempty
             | S n0 =>
                 n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                   (F n0)
             end) m) i')
    (λ _ : unit,
     BinProductPr2 C
       (C_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0

C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data (S m)
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
i: (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
# (constprod_functor2 C_bin_products X)
  (ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) g)
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products
       ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
             Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
               (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
           match
             n as n0
             return
               (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
           with
           | 0 =>
               Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                 (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty
           | S n0 =>
               n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                 (F n0)
           end) m) X)
· ProductPr (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C
    ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
          Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
        match
          n as n0
          return
            (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
               (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
        with
        | 0 =>
            Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty
        | S n0 =>
            n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products (F n0)
        end) m) i' =
extend_tuple (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, inflate (g i))
  (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inl i'))

        
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data (S m)
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
i: (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
BinProductPr1 C
  (C_bin_products (functor_identity C (power n))
     (constant_functor C C X (power n)))
· # (functor_identity C)
    (ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) g)
· ProductPr (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C
    ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
          Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
        match
          n as n0
          return
            (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
               (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
        with
        | 0 =>
            Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty
        | S n0 =>
            n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products (F n0)
        end) m) i' =
extend_tuple (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, inflate (g i))
  (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inl i'))

        
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data (S m)
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
i: (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
BinProductPr1 C
  (C_bin_products (functor_identity C (power n))
     (constant_functor C C X (power n)))
· (# (functor_identity C)
     (ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) g)
   · ProductPr (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C
       ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
             Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
               (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
           match
             n as n0
             return
               (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
           with
           | 0 =>
               Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                 (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty
           | S n0 =>
               n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                 (F n0)
           end) m) i') =
extend_tuple (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, inflate (g i))
  (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inl i'))

        
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data (S m)
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
i: (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
extend_tuple (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, inflate (g i))
  (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inl i')) =
BinProductPr1 C
  (C_bin_products (functor_identity C (power n))
     (constant_functor C C X (power n))) · g i'

        
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data (S m)
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
i: (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
inflate (g i') =
BinProductPr1 C
  (C_bin_products (functor_identity C (power n))
     (constant_functor C C X (power n))) · g i'

C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C

  n: ∏ n : ℕ,

(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),

  (power n) X

(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f

(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)

m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data (S m)
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
i: (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n)
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i))) =
BinProductPr1 C
  (C_bin_products (functor_identity C (power n))
     (constant_functor C C X (power n)))

        
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),

  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C

abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data (S m)
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
i: (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n)
  (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i0)))
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
BinProductPr1 C
  (C_bin_products (functor_identity C (power n))
     (constant_functor C C X (power n)))
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i

        
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g

abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data (S m)
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
i: (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n)
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, var (stnweq (inl i)))
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) j =
BinProductPr1 C
  (C_bin_products (functor_identity C (power n))
     (constant_functor C C X (power n)))
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) j

        
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data (S m)
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
i: (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn
i': (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
var (stnweq (inl j)) =
BinProductPr1 C
  (C_bin_products (functor_identity C (power n))
     (constant_functor C C X (power n)))
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) j

        exact (maponpaths _ (homotinvweqweq _ (inl j))).
      
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data (S m)
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
i: (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn
i': unit
# (constprod_functor2 C_bin_products X)
  (ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) g)
· coprod_rect
    (λ _ : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
     C
     ⟦ sn_power_object C_bin_products
         ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
               Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                 (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
             match
               n as n0
               return
                 (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                    (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
             with
             | 0 =>
                 Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                   (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                   weqstn0toempty
             | S n0 =>
                 n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                   (F n0)
             end) m), X ⟧)
    (λ i' : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
     BinProductPr1 C
       (C_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) m) X)
     · ProductPr (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C
         ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
               Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                 (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
             match
               n as n0
               return
                 (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                    (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
             with
             | 0 =>
                 Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                   (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                   weqstn0toempty
             | S n0 =>
                 n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                   (F n0)
             end) m) i')
    (λ _ : unit,
     BinProductPr2 C
       (C_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) m) X)) (inr i') =
extend_tuple (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, inflate (g i))
  (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inr i'))
 
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data (S m)
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
i: (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn
i': unit
BinProductPr2 C
  (C_bin_products (functor_identity C (power n))
     (constant_functor C C X (power n)))
· # (constant_functor C C X)
    (ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C (power m) g) =
extend_tuple (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, inflate (g i))
  (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inr i'))

        
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),

· BinProductPr2 C

abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data (S m)
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
i: (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn
i': unit
extend_tuple (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, inflate (g i))
  (var (stnweq (inr tt))) (stnweq (inr i')) =
BinProductPr2 C
  (C_bin_products (functor_identity C (power n))
     (constant_functor C C X (power n)))

        
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
m, n: ℕ
f: endomorphism_lambda_theory_data (S m)
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → endomorphism_lambda_theory_data n
i: (⟦ S m ⟧)%stn
i': unit
var (stnweq (inr tt)) =
BinProductPr2 C
  (C_bin_products (functor_identity C (power n))
     (constant_functor C C X (power n)))

        exact (maponpaths _ (homotinvweqweq _ (inr tt))).
  Qed.

  Definition endomorphism_lambda_theory
    : lambda_theory
    := make_lambda_theory _ endomorphism_theory_is_lambda.

(** * 3. A characterization of the endomorphism theories with β-equality *)

  
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
app_after_abs: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
has_β endomorphism_lambda_theory

  
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i

· BinProductPr1 C

bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)

  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C

  n: ∏ n : ℕ,

app_after_abs: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
n: ℕ
l: pr1
  (LambdaTheoryCategoryCore.theory_data
     endomorphism_lambda_theory) 
  (S n)
LambdaTheoryCategoryCore.β_ax
  endomorphism_lambda_theory n l

    
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),

  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C

E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
app_after_abs: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
n: ℕ
l: pr1
  (LambdaTheoryCategoryCore.theory_data
     endomorphism_lambda_theory) 
  (S n)
(pr12 (LambdaTheoryCategoryCore.theory_data
         endomorphism_lambda_theory)) n
  ((pr22 (LambdaTheoryCategoryCore.theory_data
            endomorphism_lambda_theory)) n l) =
exp_app_alt E (exp_lam_alt E l)

    
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
app_after_abs: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
n: ℕ
l: pr1
  (LambdaTheoryCategoryCore.theory_data
     endomorphism_lambda_theory) 
  (S n)
(pr22 (LambdaTheoryCategoryCore.theory_data
         endomorphism_lambda_theory)) n l · app =
exp_lam_alt E l

    
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
app_after_abs: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
n: ℕ
l: pr1
  (LambdaTheoryCategoryCore.theory_data
     endomorphism_lambda_theory) 
  (S n)
exp_lam_alt E l · (abs · app) = exp_lam_alt E l

    
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,

(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),

(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),

· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i

  (power n) X

· BinProductPr1 C

app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
app_after_abs: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
n: ℕ
l: pr1
  (LambdaTheoryCategoryCore.theory_data
     endomorphism_lambda_theory) 
  (S n)
exp_lam_alt E l · (abs · app) =
exp_lam_alt E l · identity (exp E X)

    
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)

(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),

  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
app_after_abs: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
n: ℕ
l: pr1
  (LambdaTheoryCategoryCore.theory_data
     endomorphism_lambda_theory) 
  (S n)
abs · app = identity (exp E X)

    exact app_after_abs.
  Qed.

(** * 4. A characterization of the endomorphism theories with η-equality *)

  
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
abs_after_app: app · abs = identity X
has_η endomorphism_lambda_theory

  
C: category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
abs_after_app: app · abs = identity X
has_η endomorphism_lambda_theory

  n: ∏ n : ℕ,

· BinProductPr1 C

bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)

abs_after_app: app · abs = identity X

l: pr1
  (LambdaTheoryCategoryCore.theory_data
     endomorphism_lambda_theory) n
LambdaTheoryCategoryCore.η_ax
  endomorphism_lambda_theory n l

power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
pow_commutes:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductPrCommutes (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) 
  (power n) c f i: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ c, X ⟧)
(i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i =
f i
bp_commutes_1:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr1Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr1 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = f
bp_commutes_2:= λ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductPr2Commutes C 
  (power n) X
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) c f g: ∏ (n : ℕ) (c : C)
(f : C ⟦ c, power n ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ c, X ⟧),
BinProductArrow C
  (C_bin_products (power n) X) f g
· BinProductPr2 C
    (C_bin_products (power n) X) = g
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
abs_after_app: app · abs = identity X
n: ℕ
l: pr1
  (LambdaTheoryCategoryCore.theory_data
     endomorphism_lambda_theory) n
app · abs = identity X

    exact abs_after_app.
  Qed.

End EndomorphismTheory.


X: reflexive_object
β_lambda_theory


X: reflexive_object
β_lambda_theory

  
X: reflexive_object
Terminal ?Goal
X: reflexive_object
?Goal4 · ?Goal5 = identity (exp ?Goal3 ?Goal2)

  
X: reflexive_object
Terminal ?Goal
 exact (reflexive_object_Terminal X).
  
X: reflexive_object
?Goal2 · ?Goal3 = identity (exp ?Goal1 ?Goal0)
 exact (reflexive_object_is_reflexive X).
Defined.

(** * 5. The endomorphism theory of a set *)

Definition set_endomorphism_theory
  (X : hSet)
  : algebraic_theory
  := endomorphism_theory (TerminalHSET) BinProductsHSET (X : ob HSET).

(** * 6. The morphism between endomorphism theories *)

Section Morphism.

  Context {C C' : category}.

  Context (C_terminal : Terminal C).
  Context (C_bin_products : BinProducts C).
  Context (X : C).

  Context (C'_terminal : Terminal C').
  Context (C'_bin_products : BinProducts C').
  Context (X' : C').

  Context (E : is_exponentiable C_bin_products X).
  Context (abs : C⟦exp E X, X⟧).
  Context (app : C⟦X, exp E X⟧).
  Context (C_beta : abs · app = identity _).

  Context (E' : is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X').
  Context (abs' : C'⟦exp E' X', X'⟧).
  Context (app' : C'⟦X', exp E' X'⟧).
  Context (C'_beta : abs' · app' = identity _).

  Let L := endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal C_bin_products X E abs app.
  Let L' := endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app'.

  Context (F : C ⟶ C').
  Context (F_preserves_X : z_iso (F X) X').
  Context (F_preserves_terminal : preserves_terminal F).
  Context (F_preserves_binproduct : preserves_binproduct F).

  Let power
    (n : nat)
    : Product (stn n) C (λ _, X)
    := bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products n.

  Let power'
    (n : nat)
    : Product (stn n) C' (λ _, X')
    := bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal C'_bin_products n.

  
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
z_iso (F (power n)) (power' n)

  
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
z_iso (F (power n)) (power' n)

    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
z_iso (F (power 0)) (power' 0)
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
IHn: z_iso (F (power n)) (power' n)
z_iso (F (power (S n))) (power' (S n))

    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
z_iso (F (power 0)) (power' 0)
 apply (z_iso_Terminals (make_Terminal _ (F_preserves_terminal _ (pr2 C_terminal))) C'_terminal).
    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
IHn: z_iso (F (power n)) (power' n)
z_iso (F (power (S n))) (power' (S n))
 
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
IHn: z_iso (F (power n)) (power' n)
z_iso
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
              Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
            match
              n as n0
              return
                (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
            with
            | 0 =>
                Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                  (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                  weqstn0toempty
            | S n0 =>
                n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                  (F n0)
            end) n)) (F X)) (power' (S n))

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
IHn: z_iso (F (power n)) (power' n)
z_iso
  (F
     ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
           Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
             (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
         match
           n as n0
           return
             (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
         with
         | 0 =>
             Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
               (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty
         | S n0 =>
             n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products (F n0)
         end) n))
  ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
        Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
      match
        n as n0
        return
          (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
             (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
      with
      | 0 =>
          Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
            (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty
      | S n0 =>
          n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products (F n0)
      end) n)
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
IHn: z_iso (F (power n)) (power' n)
z_iso (F X) X'

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
IHn: z_iso (F (power n)) (power' n)
z_iso
  (F
     ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
           Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
             (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
         match
           n as n0
           return
             (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
         with
         | 0 =>
             Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
               (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty
         | S n0 =>
             n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products (F n0)
         end) n))
  ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
        Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
      match
        n as n0
        return
          (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
             (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
      with
      | 0 =>
          Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
            (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty
      | S n0 =>
          n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products (F n0)
      end) n)
 exact IHn.
      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
IHn: z_iso (F (power n)) (power' n)
z_iso (F X) X'
 exact F_preserves_X.
  Defined.

  
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
# F (ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i) =
F_power_iso n · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X

  
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
# F (ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i) =
F_power_iso n · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X

    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
i: (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn
# F (ProductPr (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn C (power 0) i) =
F_power_iso 0 · ProductPr (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn C' (power' 0) i
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
IHn: ∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
# F (ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i) =
F_power_iso n
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
# F (ProductPr (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn C (power (S n)) i) =
F_power_iso (S n)
· ProductPr (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn C' (power' (S n)) i
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X

    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
i: (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn
# F (ProductPr (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn C (power 0) i) =
F_power_iso 0 · ProductPr (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn C' (power' 0) i
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
 induction (negnatlthn0 _ (stnlt i)).
    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
IHn: ∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
# F (ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i) =
F_power_iso n
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
# F (ProductPr (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn C (power (S n)) i) =
F_power_iso (S n)
· ProductPr (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn C' (power' (S n)) i
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
 
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
IHn: ∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
# F (ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i) =
F_power_iso n
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
# F
  (ProductPr (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn C (power (S n))
     (stnweq (invmap stnweq i))) =
F_power_iso (S n)
· ProductPr (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn C' (power' (S n))
    (stnweq (invmap stnweq i))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
IHn: ∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
# F (ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i) =
F_power_iso n
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
# F
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
      C
      ⟦ sn_power_object C_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n), X ⟧)
     (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
      BinProductPr1 C
        (C_bin_products
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n) X)
      · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n) i')
     (λ _ : unit,
      BinProductPr2 C
        (C_bin_products
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n) X)) (inl i')) =
F_power_iso (S n)
· coprod_rect
    (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
     C'
     ⟦ sn_power_object C'_bin_products
         ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
               Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
                 (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
             match
               n as n0
               return
                 (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
                    (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
             with
             | 0 =>
                 Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
                   (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X')
                   weqstn0toempty
             | S n0 =>
                 n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
                   (F n0)
             end) n), X' ⟧)
    (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
     BinProductPr1 C'
       (C'_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product
                    C'_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X')
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n) X')
     · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
         ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
               Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
                 (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
             match
               n as n0
               return
                 (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
                    (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
             with
             | 0 =>
                 Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
                   (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X')
                   weqstn0toempty
             | S n0 =>
                 n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
                   (F n0)
             end) n) i')
    (λ _ : unit,
     BinProductPr2 C'
       (C'_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product
                    C'_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X')
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n) X')) (inl i')
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
