bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
IHn: ∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
# F (ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i) =
F_power_iso n
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
i': unit
# F
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
      C
      ⟦ sn_power_object C_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product 
                  (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C 
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product 
                     (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n), X ⟧)
     (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
      BinProductPr1 C
        (C_bin_products
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product 
                   (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product 
                     (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal 
                     (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n) X)
      · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product 
                  (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C 
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product 
                     (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n) i')
     (λ _ : unit,
      BinProductPr2 C
        (C_bin_products
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product 
                   (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product 
                     (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal 
                     (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n) X)) 
     (inr i')) =
F_power_iso (S n)
· coprod_rect
    (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
     C'
     ⟦ sn_power_object C'_bin_products
         ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
               Product 
                 (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
                 (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
             match
               n as n0
               return
                 (Product 
                    (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
                    (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
             with
             | 0 =>
                 Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
                   (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X')
                   weqstn0toempty
             | S n0 =>
                 n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
                   (F n0)
             end) n), X' ⟧)
    (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
     BinProductPr1 C'
       (C'_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product 
                  (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product 
                     (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product
                    C'_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X')
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n) X')
     · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
         ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
               Product 
                 (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
                 (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
             match
               n as n0
               return
                 (Product 
                    (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
                    (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
             with
             | 0 =>
                 Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
                   (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X')
                   weqstn0toempty
             | S n0 =>
                 n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
                   (F n0)
             end) n) i')
    (λ _ : unit,
     BinProductPr2 C'
       (C'_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product 
                  (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product 
                     (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product
                    C'_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X')
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n) X')) 
    (inr i') · inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
IHn: ∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
# F (ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i) =
F_power_iso n
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
# F
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
      C
      ⟦ sn_power_object C_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n), X ⟧)
     (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
      BinProductPr1 C
        (C_bin_products
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n) X)
      · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n) i')
     (λ _ : unit,
      BinProductPr2 C
        (C_bin_products
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n) X)) (inl i')) =
F_power_iso (S n)
· coprod_rect
    (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
     C'
     ⟦ sn_power_object C'_bin_products
         ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
               Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
                 (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
             match
               n as n0
               return
                 (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
                    (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
             with
             | 0 =>
                 Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
                   (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X')
                   weqstn0toempty
             | S n0 =>
                 n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
                   (F n0)
             end) n), X' ⟧)
    (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
     BinProductPr1 C'
       (C'_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product
                    C'_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X')
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n) X')
     · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
         ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
               Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
                 (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
             match
               n as n0
               return
                 (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
                    (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
             with
             | 0 =>
                 Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
                   (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X')
                   weqstn0toempty
             | S n0 =>
                 n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
                   (F n0)
             end) n) i')
    (λ _ : unit,
     BinProductPr2 C'
       (C'_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product
                    C'_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X')
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n) X')) (inl i')
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
 
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
IHn: ∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
# F (ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i) =
F_power_iso n
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
# F
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
      C
      ⟦ sn_power_object C_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n), X ⟧)
     (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
      BinProductPr1 C
        (C_bin_products
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n) X)
      · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n) i')
     (λ _ : unit,
      BinProductPr2 C
        (C_bin_products
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n) X)) (inl i')) =
F_power_iso (S n)
· BinProductPr1 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
             Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
               (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
           match
             n as n0
             return
               (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
           with
           | 0 =>
               Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
                 (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X')
                 weqstn0toempty
           | S n0 =>
               n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
                 (F n0)
           end) n) X')
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
    ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
          Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
            (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
        match
          n as n0
          return
            (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
               (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
        with
        | 0 =>
            Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty
        | S n0 =>
            n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products (F n0)
        end) n) i' · inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X

        
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
IHn: ∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
# F (ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i) =
F_power_iso n
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
# F
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
      C
      ⟦ sn_power_object C_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n), X ⟧)
     (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
      BinProductPr1 C
        (C_bin_products
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n) X)
      · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n) i')
     (λ _ : unit,
      BinProductPr2 C
        (C_bin_products
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n) X)) (inl i')) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products
     ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
           Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
             (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
         match
           n as n0
           return
             (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
         with
         | 0 =>
             Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
               (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty
         | S n0 =>
             n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products (F n0)
         end) n) X)
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
              Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
            match
              n as n0
              return
                (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
            with
            | 0 =>
                Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                  (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                  weqstn0toempty
            | S n0 =>
                n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                  (F n0)
            end) n)) (F X))
· (binproduct_of_z_iso
     (C'_bin_products
        (F
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n)) (F X))
     (C'_bin_products
        ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
              Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
                (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
            match
              n as n0
              return
                (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
            with
            | 0 =>
                Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
                  (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X')
                  weqstn0toempty
            | S n0 =>
                n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
                  (F n0)
            end) n) X')
     ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
           z_iso (F (power n)) (power' n) :=
         match
           n as n0
           return (z_iso (F (power n0)) (power' n0))
         with
         | 0 =>
             z_iso_Terminals
               (make_Terminal (F (pr1 C_terminal))
                  (F_preserves_terminal
                     (pr1 C_terminal) (pr2 C_terminal)))
               C'_terminal
         | S n0 =>
             z_iso_comp
               (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
                  F_preserves_binproduct
                  (C_bin_products
                     ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                           Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn C
                             (λ _ : ...%stn, X) :=
                         match
                           n1 as n2 return (...)
                         with
                         | 0 =>
                             Terminal_is_empty_product
                               C_terminal (λ ..., X)
                               weqstn0toempty
                         | S n2 =>
                             n_power_to_sn_power
                               C_bin_products (F0 n2)
                         end) n0) X)
                  (C'_bin_products
                     (F
                        ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                              Product (...)%stn C
                                (...) :=
                            match ... ... with
                            | ... =>
                                Terminal_is_empty_product
                                  C_terminal ...
                                  weqstn0toempty
                            | ... =>
                                n_power_to_sn_power
                                  C_bin_products ...
                            end) n0)) (F X)))
               (binproduct_of_z_iso
                  (C'_bin_products
                     (F
                        ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                              Product (...)%stn C
                                (...) :=
                            match ... ... with
                            | ... =>
                                Terminal_is_empty_product
                                  C_terminal ...
                                  weqstn0toempty
                            | ... =>
                                n_power_to_sn_power
                                  C_bin_products ...
                            end) n0)) (F X))
                  (C'_bin_products
                     ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                           Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn C'
                             (λ _ : ...%stn, X') :=
                         match
                           n1 as n2 return (...)
                         with
                         | 0 =>
                             Terminal_is_empty_product
                               C'_terminal (λ ..., X')
                               weqstn0toempty
                         | S n2 =>
                             n_power_to_sn_power
                               C'_bin_products (F0 n2)
                         end) n0) X') (F n0)
                  F_preserves_X)
         end) n) F_preserves_X
   · BinProductPr1 C'
       (C'_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product
                    C'_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X')
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n) X'))
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
    ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
          Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
            (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
        match
          n as n0
          return
            (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
               (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
        with
        | 0 =>
            Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty
        | S n0 =>
            n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products (F n0)
        end) n) i' · inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X

        
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
IHn: ∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
# F (ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i) =
F_power_iso n
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
# F
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
      C
      ⟦ sn_power_object C_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n), X ⟧)
     (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
      BinProductPr1 C
        (C_bin_products
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n) X)
      · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n) i')
     (λ _ : unit,
      BinProductPr2 C
        (C_bin_products
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n) X)) (inl i')) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products
     ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
           Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
             (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
         match
           n as n0
           return
             (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
         with
         | 0 =>
             Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
               (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty
         | S n0 =>
             n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products (F n0)
         end) n) X)
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
              Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
            match
              n as n0
              return
                (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
            with
            | 0 =>
                Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                  (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                  weqstn0toempty
            | S n0 =>
                n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                  (F n0)
            end) n)) (F X))
· (BinProductPr1 C'
     (C'_bin_products
        (F
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n)) (F X))
   · (fix F (n : ℕ) :
          z_iso (F (power n)) (power' n) :=
        match
          n as n0
          return (z_iso (F (power n0)) (power' n0))
        with
        | 0 =>
            z_iso_Terminals
              (make_Terminal (F (pr1 C_terminal))
                 (F_preserves_terminal
                    (pr1 C_terminal) (pr2 C_terminal)))
              C'_terminal
        | S n0 =>
            z_iso_comp
              (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
                 F_preserves_binproduct
                 (C_bin_products
                    ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                          Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn C
                            (λ _ : (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                        match
                          n1 as n2
                          return
                            (Product (...)%stn C (...))
                        with
                        | 0 =>
                            Terminal_is_empty_product
                              C_terminal
                              (λ _ : (...)%stn, X)
                              weqstn0toempty
                        | S n2 =>
                            n_power_to_sn_power
                              C_bin_products (F0 n2)
                        end) n0) X)
                 (C'_bin_products
                    (F
                       ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                             Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn C
                               (λ _ : ...%stn, X) :=
                           match
                             n1 as n2 return (...)
                           with
                           | 0 =>
                               Terminal_is_empty_product
                                 C_terminal (λ ..., X)
                                 weqstn0toempty
                           | S n2 =>
                               n_power_to_sn_power
                                 C_bin_products
                                 (F0 n2)
                           end) n0)) (F X)))
              (binproduct_of_z_iso
                 (C'_bin_products
                    (F
                       ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                             Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn C
                               (λ _ : ...%stn, X) :=
                           match
                             n1 as n2 return (...)
                           with
                           | 0 =>
                               Terminal_is_empty_product
                                 C_terminal (λ ..., X)
                                 weqstn0toempty
                           | S n2 =>
                               n_power_to_sn_power
                                 C_bin_products
                                 (F0 n2)
                           end) n0)) (F X))
                 (C'_bin_products
                    ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                          Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn C'
                            (λ _ : (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn, X') :=
                        match
                          n1 as n2
                          return
                            (Product (...)%stn C'
                               (...))
                        with
                        | 0 =>
                            Terminal_is_empty_product
                              C'_terminal
                              (λ _ : (...)%stn, X')
                              weqstn0toempty
                        | S n2 =>
                            n_power_to_sn_power
                              C'_bin_products (F0 n2)
                        end) n0) X') (F n0)
                 F_preserves_X)
        end) n)
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
    ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
          Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
            (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
        match
          n as n0
          return
            (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
               (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
        with
        | 0 =>
            Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty
        | S n0 =>
            n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products (F n0)
        end) n) i' · inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X

        
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
IHn: ∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
# F (ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i) =
F_power_iso n
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
# F
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
      C
      ⟦ sn_power_object C_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n), X ⟧)
     (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
      BinProductPr1 C
        (C_bin_products
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n) X)
      · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n) i')
     (λ _ : unit,
      BinProductPr2 C
        (C_bin_products
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n) X)) (inl i')) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products
     ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
           Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
             (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
         match
           n as n0
           return
             (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
         with
         | 0 =>
             Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
               (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty
         | S n0 =>
             n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products (F n0)
         end) n) X)
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
              Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
            match
              n as n0
              return
                (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
            with
            | 0 =>
                Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                  (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                  weqstn0toempty
            | S n0 =>
                n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                  (F n0)
            end) n)) (F X))
· BinProductPr1 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n)) (F X))
· (fix F (n : ℕ) : z_iso (F (power n)) (power' n) :=
     match
       n as n0
       return (z_iso (F (power n0)) (power' n0))
     with
     | 0 =>
         z_iso_Terminals
           (make_Terminal (F (pr1 C_terminal))
              (F_preserves_terminal (pr1 C_terminal)
                 (pr2 C_terminal))) C'_terminal
     | S n0 =>
         z_iso_comp
           (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
              F_preserves_binproduct
              (C_bin_products
                 ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                       Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn C
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                     match
                       n1 as n2
                       return
                         (Product (⟦ n2 ⟧)%stn C
                            (λ _ : ...%stn, X))
                     with
                     | 0 =>
                         Terminal_is_empty_product
                           C_terminal
                           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                           weqstn0toempty
                     | S n2 =>
                         n_power_to_sn_power
                           C_bin_products (F0 n2)
                     end) n0) X)
              (C'_bin_products
                 (F
                    ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                          Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn C
                            (λ _ : (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                        match
                          n1 as n2
                          return
                            (Product (...)%stn C (...))
                        with
                        | 0 =>
                            Terminal_is_empty_product
                              C_terminal
                              (λ _ : (...)%stn, X)
                              weqstn0toempty
                        | S n2 =>
                            n_power_to_sn_power
                              C_bin_products (F0 n2)
                        end) n0)) (F X)))
           (binproduct_of_z_iso
              (C'_bin_products
                 (F
                    ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                          Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn C
                            (λ _ : (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                        match
                          n1 as n2
                          return
                            (Product (...)%stn C (...))
                        with
                        | 0 =>
                            Terminal_is_empty_product
                              C_terminal
                              (λ _ : (...)%stn, X)
                              weqstn0toempty
                        | S n2 =>
                            n_power_to_sn_power
                              C_bin_products (F0 n2)
                        end) n0)) (F X))
              (C'_bin_products
                 ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                       Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn C'
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn, X') :=
                     match
                       n1 as n2
                       return
                         (Product (⟦ n2 ⟧)%stn C'
                            (λ _ : ...%stn, X'))
                     with
                     | 0 =>
                         Terminal_is_empty_product
                           C'_terminal
                           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X')
                           weqstn0toempty
                     | S n2 =>
                         n_power_to_sn_power
                           C'_bin_products (F0 n2)
                     end) n0) X') (F n0) F_preserves_X)
     end) n
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
    ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
          Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
            (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
        match
          n as n0
          return
            (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
               (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
        with
        | 0 =>
            Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty
        | S n0 =>
            n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products (F n0)
        end) n) i' · inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X

        
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
IHn: ∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
# F (ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i) =
F_power_iso n
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
# F
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
      C
      ⟦ sn_power_object C_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n), X ⟧)
     (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
      BinProductPr1 C
        (C_bin_products
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n) X)
      · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n) i')
     (λ _ : unit,
      BinProductPr2 C
        (C_bin_products
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n) X)) (inl i')) =
BinProductPr1 C'
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     F_preserves_binproduct
     (C_bin_products
        ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
              Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
            match
              n as n0
              return
                (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
            with
            | 0 =>
                Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                  (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                  weqstn0toempty
            | S n0 =>
                n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                  (F n0)
            end) n) X))
· (fix F (n : ℕ) : z_iso (F (power n)) (power' n) :=
     match
       n as n0
       return (z_iso (F (power n0)) (power' n0))
     with
     | 0 =>
         z_iso_Terminals
           (make_Terminal (F (pr1 C_terminal))
              (F_preserves_terminal (pr1 C_terminal)
                 (pr2 C_terminal))) C'_terminal
     | S n0 =>
         z_iso_comp
           (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
              F_preserves_binproduct
              (C_bin_products
                 ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                       Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn C
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                     match
                       n1 as n2
                       return
                         (Product (⟦ n2 ⟧)%stn C
                            (λ _ : ...%stn, X))
                     with
                     | 0 =>
                         Terminal_is_empty_product
                           C_terminal
                           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                           weqstn0toempty
                     | S n2 =>
                         n_power_to_sn_power
                           C_bin_products (F0 n2)
                     end) n0) X)
              (C'_bin_products
                 (F
                    ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                          Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn C
                            (λ _ : (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                        match
                          n1 as n2
                          return
                            (Product (...)%stn C (...))
                        with
                        | 0 =>
                            Terminal_is_empty_product
                              C_terminal
                              (λ _ : (...)%stn, X)
                              weqstn0toempty
                        | S n2 =>
                            n_power_to_sn_power
                              C_bin_products (F0 n2)
                        end) n0)) (F X)))
           (binproduct_of_z_iso
              (C'_bin_products
                 (F
                    ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                          Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn C
                            (λ _ : (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                        match
                          n1 as n2
                          return
                            (Product (...)%stn C (...))
                        with
                        | 0 =>
                            Terminal_is_empty_product
                              C_terminal
                              (λ _ : (...)%stn, X)
                              weqstn0toempty
                        | S n2 =>
                            n_power_to_sn_power
                              C_bin_products (F0 n2)
                        end) n0)) (F X))
              (C'_bin_products
                 ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                       Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn C'
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn, X') :=
                     match
                       n1 as n2
                       return
                         (Product (⟦ n2 ⟧)%stn C'
                            (λ _ : ...%stn, X'))
                     with
                     | 0 =>
                         Terminal_is_empty_product
                           C'_terminal
                           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X')
                           weqstn0toempty
                     | S n2 =>
                         n_power_to_sn_power
                           C'_bin_products (F0 n2)
                     end) n0) X') (F n0) F_preserves_X)
     end) n
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
    ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
          Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
            (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
        match
          n as n0
          return
            (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
               (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
        with
        | 0 =>
            Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty
        | S n0 =>
            n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products (F n0)
        end) n) i' · inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X

        
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
IHn: ∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
# F (ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i) =
F_power_iso n
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
# F
  (BinProductPr1 C
     (C_bin_products
        ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
              Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
            match
              n as n0
              return
                (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
            with
            | 0 =>
                Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                  (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                  weqstn0toempty
            | S n0 =>
                n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                  (F n0)
            end) n) X))
· # F
    (ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
       ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
             Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
               (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
           match
             n as n0
             return
               (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
           with
           | 0 =>
               Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                 (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty
           | S n0 =>
               n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                 (F n0)
           end) n) i') =
BinProductPr1 C'
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     F_preserves_binproduct
     (C_bin_products
        ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
              Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
            match
              n as n0
              return
                (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
            with
            | 0 =>
                Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                  (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                  weqstn0toempty
            | S n0 =>
                n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                  (F n0)
            end) n) X))
· (fix F (n : ℕ) : z_iso (F (power n)) (power' n) :=
     match
       n as n0
       return (z_iso (F (power n0)) (power' n0))
     with
     | 0 =>
         z_iso_Terminals
           (make_Terminal (F (pr1 C_terminal))
              (F_preserves_terminal (pr1 C_terminal)
                 (pr2 C_terminal))) C'_terminal
     | S n0 =>
         z_iso_comp
           (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
              F_preserves_binproduct
              (C_bin_products
                 ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                       Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn C
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                     match
                       n1 as n2
                       return
                         (Product (⟦ n2 ⟧)%stn C
                            (λ _ : ...%stn, X))
                     with
                     | 0 =>
                         Terminal_is_empty_product
                           C_terminal
                           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                           weqstn0toempty
                     | S n2 =>
                         n_power_to_sn_power
                           C_bin_products (F0 n2)
                     end) n0) X)
              (C'_bin_products
                 (F
                    ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                          Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn C
                            (λ _ : (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                        match
                          n1 as n2
                          return
                            (Product (...)%stn C (...))
                        with
                        | 0 =>
                            Terminal_is_empty_product
                              C_terminal
                              (λ _ : (...)%stn, X)
                              weqstn0toempty
                        | S n2 =>
                            n_power_to_sn_power
                              C_bin_products (F0 n2)
                        end) n0)) (F X)))
           (binproduct_of_z_iso
              (C'_bin_products
                 (F
                    ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                          Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn C
                            (λ _ : (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                        match
                          n1 as n2
                          return
                            (Product (...)%stn C (...))
                        with
                        | 0 =>
                            Terminal_is_empty_product
                              C_terminal
                              (λ _ : (...)%stn, X)
                              weqstn0toempty
                        | S n2 =>
                            n_power_to_sn_power
                              C_bin_products (F0 n2)
                        end) n0)) (F X))
              (C'_bin_products
                 ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                       Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn C'
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn, X') :=
                     match
                       n1 as n2
                       return
                         (Product (⟦ n2 ⟧)%stn C'
                            (λ _ : ...%stn, X'))
                     with
                     | 0 =>
                         Terminal_is_empty_product
                           C'_terminal
                           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X')
                           weqstn0toempty
                     | S n2 =>
                         n_power_to_sn_power
                           C'_bin_products (F0 n2)
                     end) n0) X') (F n0) F_preserves_X)
     end) n
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
    ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
          Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
            (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
        match
          n as n0
          return
            (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
               (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
        with
        | 0 =>
            Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty
        | S n0 =>
            n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products (F n0)
        end) n) i' · inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X

        
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
IHn: ∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
# F (ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i) =
F_power_iso n
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
# F
  (BinProductPr1 C
     (C_bin_products
        ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
              Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
            match
              n as n0
              return
                (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
            with
            | 0 =>
                Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                  (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                  weqstn0toempty
            | S n0 =>
                n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                  (F n0)
            end) n) X))
· (F_power_iso n
   · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i'
   · inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X) =
BinProductPr1 C'
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     F_preserves_binproduct
     (C_bin_products
        ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
              Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
            match
              n as n0
              return
                (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
            with
            | 0 =>
                Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                  (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                  weqstn0toempty
            | S n0 =>
                n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                  (F n0)
            end) n) X))
· (fix F (n : ℕ) : z_iso (F (power n)) (power' n) :=
     match
       n as n0
       return (z_iso (F (power n0)) (power' n0))
     with
     | 0 =>
         z_iso_Terminals
           (make_Terminal (F (pr1 C_terminal))
              (F_preserves_terminal (pr1 C_terminal)
                 (pr2 C_terminal))) C'_terminal
     | S n0 =>
         z_iso_comp
           (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
              F_preserves_binproduct
              (C_bin_products
                 ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                       Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn C
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                     match
                       n1 as n2
                       return
                         (Product (⟦ n2 ⟧)%stn C
                            (λ _ : ...%stn, X))
                     with
                     | 0 =>
                         Terminal_is_empty_product
                           C_terminal
                           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                           weqstn0toempty
                     | S n2 =>
                         n_power_to_sn_power
                           C_bin_products (F0 n2)
                     end) n0) X)
              (C'_bin_products
                 (F
                    ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                          Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn C
                            (λ _ : (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                        match
                          n1 as n2
                          return
                            (Product (...)%stn C (...))
                        with
                        | 0 =>
                            Terminal_is_empty_product
                              C_terminal
                              (λ _ : (...)%stn, X)
                              weqstn0toempty
                        | S n2 =>
                            n_power_to_sn_power
                              C_bin_products (F0 n2)
                        end) n0)) (F X)))
           (binproduct_of_z_iso
              (C'_bin_products
                 (F
                    ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                          Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn C
                            (λ _ : (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                        match
                          n1 as n2
                          return
                            (Product (...)%stn C (...))
                        with
                        | 0 =>
                            Terminal_is_empty_product
                              C_terminal
                              (λ _ : (...)%stn, X)
                              weqstn0toempty
                        | S n2 =>
                            n_power_to_sn_power
                              C_bin_products (F0 n2)
                        end) n0)) (F X))
              (C'_bin_products
                 ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                       Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn C'
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn, X') :=
                     match
                       n1 as n2
                       return
                         (Product (⟦ n2 ⟧)%stn C'
                            (λ _ : ...%stn, X'))
                     with
                     | 0 =>
                         Terminal_is_empty_product
                           C'_terminal
                           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X')
                           weqstn0toempty
                     | S n2 =>
                         n_power_to_sn_power
                           C'_bin_products (F0 n2)
                     end) n0) X') (F n0) F_preserves_X)
     end) n
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
    ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
          Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
            (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
        match
          n as n0
          return
            (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
               (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
        with
        | 0 =>
            Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty
        | S n0 =>
            n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products (F n0)
        end) n) i' · inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X

        
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
IHn: ∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
# F (ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i) =
F_power_iso n
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
i': (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
# F
  (BinProductPr1 C
     (C_bin_products
        ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
              Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
            match
              n as n0
              return
                (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
            with
            | 0 =>
                Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                  (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                  weqstn0toempty
            | S n0 =>
                n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                  (F n0)
            end) n) X))
· (F_power_iso n
   · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i')
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X =
BinProductPr1 C'
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     F_preserves_binproduct
     (C_bin_products
        ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
              Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
            match
              n as n0
              return
                (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
            with
            | 0 =>
                Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                  (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                  weqstn0toempty
            | S n0 =>
                n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                  (F n0)
            end) n) X))
· (fix F (n : ℕ) : z_iso (F (power n)) (power' n) :=
     match
       n as n0
       return (z_iso (F (power n0)) (power' n0))
     with
     | 0 =>
         z_iso_Terminals
           (make_Terminal (F (pr1 C_terminal))
              (F_preserves_terminal (pr1 C_terminal)
                 (pr2 C_terminal))) C'_terminal
     | S n0 =>
         z_iso_comp
           (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
              F_preserves_binproduct
              (C_bin_products
                 ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                       Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn C
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                     match
                       n1 as n2
                       return
                         (Product (⟦ n2 ⟧)%stn C
                            (λ _ : ...%stn, X))
                     with
                     | 0 =>
                         Terminal_is_empty_product
                           C_terminal
                           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                           weqstn0toempty
                     | S n2 =>
                         n_power_to_sn_power
                           C_bin_products (F0 n2)
                     end) n0) X)
              (C'_bin_products
                 (F
                    ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                          Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn C
                            (λ _ : (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                        match
                          n1 as n2
                          return
                            (Product (...)%stn C (...))
                        with
                        | 0 =>
                            Terminal_is_empty_product
                              C_terminal
                              (λ _ : (...)%stn, X)
                              weqstn0toempty
                        | S n2 =>
                            n_power_to_sn_power
                              C_bin_products (F0 n2)
                        end) n0)) (F X)))
           (binproduct_of_z_iso
              (C'_bin_products
                 (F
                    ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                          Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn C
                            (λ _ : (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn, X) :=
                        match
                          n1 as n2
                          return
                            (Product (...)%stn C (...))
                        with
                        | 0 =>
                            Terminal_is_empty_product
                              C_terminal
                              (λ _ : (...)%stn, X)
                              weqstn0toempty
                        | S n2 =>
                            n_power_to_sn_power
                              C_bin_products (F0 n2)
                        end) n0)) (F X))
              (C'_bin_products
                 ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                       Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn C'
                         (λ _ : (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn, X') :=
                     match
                       n1 as n2
                       return
                         (Product (⟦ n2 ⟧)%stn C'
                            (λ _ : ...%stn, X'))
                     with
                     | 0 =>
                         Terminal_is_empty_product
                           C'_terminal
                           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X')
                           weqstn0toempty
                     | S n2 =>
                         n_power_to_sn_power
                           C'_bin_products (F0 n2)
                     end) n0) X') (F n0) F_preserves_X)
     end) n
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
    ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
          Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
            (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
        match
          n as n0
          return
            (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
               (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
        with
        | 0 =>
            Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty
        | S n0 =>
            n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products (F n0)
        end) n) i' · inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X

        exact (maponpaths (λ x, x · _) (assoc _ _ _)).
      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
IHn: ∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
# F (ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i) =
F_power_iso n
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
i': unit
# F
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
      C
      ⟦ sn_power_object C_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n), X ⟧)
     (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
      BinProductPr1 C
        (C_bin_products
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n) X)
      · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n) i')
     (λ _ : unit,
      BinProductPr2 C
        (C_bin_products
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n) X)) (inr i')) =
F_power_iso (S n)
· coprod_rect
    (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
     C'
     ⟦ sn_power_object C'_bin_products
         ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
               Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
                 (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
             match
               n as n0
               return
                 (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
                    (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
             with
             | 0 =>
                 Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
                   (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X')
                   weqstn0toempty
             | S n0 =>
                 n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
                   (F n0)
             end) n), X' ⟧)
    (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
     BinProductPr1 C'
       (C'_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product
                    C'_terminal
