                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X')
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n) X')
     · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
         ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
               Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
                 (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
             match
               n as n0
               return
                 (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
                    (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
             with
             | 0 =>
                 Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
                   (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X')
                   weqstn0toempty
             | S n0 =>
                 n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
                   (F n0)
             end) n) i')
    (λ _ : unit,
     BinProductPr2 C'
       (C'_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product
                    C'_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X')
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n) X')) (inr i')
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
 
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
IHn: ∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
# F (ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i) =
F_power_iso n
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
i': unit
# F
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
      C
      ⟦ sn_power_object C_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n), X ⟧)
     (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
      BinProductPr1 C
        (C_bin_products
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n) X)
      · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n) i')
     (λ _ : unit,
      BinProductPr2 C
        (C_bin_products
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n) X)) (inr i')) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products
     ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
           Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
             (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
         match
           n as n0
           return
             (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
         with
         | 0 =>
             Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
               (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty
         | S n0 =>
             n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products (F n0)
         end) n) X)
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
              Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
            match
              n as n0
              return
                (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
            with
            | 0 =>
                Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                  (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                  weqstn0toempty
            | S n0 =>
                n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                  (F n0)
            end) n)) (F X))
· (binproduct_of_z_iso
     (C'_bin_products
        (F
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n)) (F X))
     (C'_bin_products
        ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
              Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
                (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
            match
              n as n0
              return
                (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
            with
            | 0 =>
                Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
                  (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X')
                  weqstn0toempty
            | S n0 =>
                n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
                  (F n0)
            end) n) X')
     ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
           z_iso (F (power n)) (power' n) :=
         match
           n as n0
           return (z_iso (F (power n0)) (power' n0))
         with
         | 0 =>
             z_iso_Terminals
               (make_Terminal (F (pr1 C_terminal))
                  (F_preserves_terminal
                     (pr1 C_terminal) (pr2 C_terminal)))
               C'_terminal
         | S n0 =>
             z_iso_comp
               (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
                  F_preserves_binproduct
                  (C_bin_products
                     ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                           Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn C
                             (λ _ : (...)%stn, X) :=
                         match
                           n1 as n2
                           return
                             (Product ...%stn C ...)
                         with
                         | 0 =>
                             Terminal_is_empty_product
                               C_terminal
                               (λ _ : ...%stn, X)
                               weqstn0toempty
                         | S n2 =>
                             n_power_to_sn_power
                               C_bin_products (F0 n2)
                         end) n0) X)
                  (C'_bin_products
                     (F
                        ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                              Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn C
                                (λ ..., X) :=
                            match
                              n1 as n2 return ...
                            with
                            | 0 =>
                                Terminal_is_empty_product
                                  C_terminal (...)
                                  weqstn0toempty
                            | S n2 =>
                                n_power_to_sn_power
                                  C_bin_products (...)
                            end) n0)) (F X)))
               (binproduct_of_z_iso
                  (C'_bin_products
                     (F
                        ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                              Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn C
                                (λ ..., X) :=
                            match
                              n1 as n2 return ...
                            with
                            | 0 =>
                                Terminal_is_empty_product
                                  C_terminal (...)
                                  weqstn0toempty
                            | S n2 =>
                                n_power_to_sn_power
                                  C_bin_products (...)
                            end) n0)) (F X))
                  (C'_bin_products
                     ((fix F0 (n1 : ℕ) :
                           Product (⟦ n1 ⟧)%stn C'
                             (λ _ : (...)%stn, X') :=
                         match
                           n1 as n2
                           return
                             (Product ...%stn C' ...)
                         with
                         | 0 =>
                             Terminal_is_empty_product
                               C'_terminal
                               (λ _ : ...%stn, X')
                               weqstn0toempty
                         | S n2 =>
                             n_power_to_sn_power
                               C'_bin_products (F0 n2)
                         end) n0) X') (F n0)
                  F_preserves_X)
         end) n) F_preserves_X
   · coprod_rect
       (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
        C'
        ⟦ sn_power_object C'_bin_products
            ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                  Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
                    (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
                match
                  n as n0
                  return
                    (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
                       (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
                with
                | 0 =>
                    Terminal_is_empty_product
                      C'_terminal
                      (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X')
                      weqstn0toempty
                | S n0 =>
                    n_power_to_sn_power
                      C'_bin_products (F n0)
                end) n), X' ⟧)
       (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
        BinProductPr1 C'
          (C'_bin_products
             ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                   Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
                 match
                   n as n0
                   return
                     (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
                        (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
                 with
                 | 0 =>
                     Terminal_is_empty_product
                       C'_terminal
                       (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X')
                       weqstn0toempty
                 | S n0 =>
                     n_power_to_sn_power
                       C'_bin_products (F n0)
                 end) n) X')
        · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
            ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                  Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
                    (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
                match
                  n as n0
                  return
                    (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
                       (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
                with
                | 0 =>
                    Terminal_is_empty_product
                      C'_terminal
                      (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X')
                      weqstn0toempty
                | S n0 =>
                    n_power_to_sn_power
                      C'_bin_products (F n0)
                end) n) i')
       (λ _ : unit,
        BinProductPr2 C'
          (C'_bin_products
             ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                   Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X') :=
                 match
                   n as n0
                   return
                     (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C'
                        (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X'))
                 with
                 | 0 =>
                     Terminal_is_empty_product
                       C'_terminal
                       (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X')
                       weqstn0toempty
                 | S n0 =>
                     n_power_to_sn_power
                       C'_bin_products (F n0)
                 end) n) X')) (inr i'))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X

        
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
IHn: ∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
# F (ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i) =
F_power_iso n
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
i': unit
# F
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
      C
      ⟦ sn_power_object C_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n), X ⟧)
     (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
      BinProductPr1 C
        (C_bin_products
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n) X)
      · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n) i')
     (λ _ : unit,
      BinProductPr2 C
        (C_bin_products
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n) X)) (inr i')) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products
     ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
           Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
             (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
         match
           n as n0
           return
             (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
         with
         | 0 =>
             Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
               (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty
         | S n0 =>
             n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products (F n0)
         end) n) X)
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
              Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
            match
              n as n0
              return
                (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
            with
            | 0 =>
                Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                  (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                  weqstn0toempty
            | S n0 =>
                n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                  (F n0)
            end) n)) (F X))
· (BinProductPr2 C'
     (C'_bin_products
        (F
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n)) (F X)) · F_preserves_X)
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X

        
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
IHn: ∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
# F (ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i) =
F_power_iso n
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
i': unit
# F
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
      C
      ⟦ sn_power_object C_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n), X ⟧)
     (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
      BinProductPr1 C
        (C_bin_products
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n) X)
      · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n) i')
     (λ _ : unit,
      BinProductPr2 C
        (C_bin_products
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n) X)) (inr i')) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products
     ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
           Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
             (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
         match
           n as n0
           return
             (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
         with
         | 0 =>
             Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
               (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty
         | S n0 =>
             n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products (F n0)
         end) n) X)
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
              Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
            match
              n as n0
              return
                (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
            with
            | 0 =>
                Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                  (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                  weqstn0toempty
            | S n0 =>
                n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                  (F n0)
            end) n)) (F X))
· BinProductPr2 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n)) (F X)) · F_preserves_X
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X

        
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
IHn: ∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
# F (ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i) =
F_power_iso n
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
i': unit
# F
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
      C
      ⟦ sn_power_object C_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n), X ⟧)
     (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
      BinProductPr1 C
        (C_bin_products
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n) X)
      · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n) i')
     (λ _ : unit,
      BinProductPr2 C
        (C_bin_products
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n) X)) (inr i')) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products
     ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
           Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
             (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
         match
           n as n0
           return
             (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
         with
         | 0 =>
             Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
               (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty
         | S n0 =>
             n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products (F n0)
         end) n) X)
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
              Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
            match
              n as n0
              return
                (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
            with
            | 0 =>
                Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                  (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                  weqstn0toempty
            | S n0 =>
                n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                  (F n0)
            end) n)) (F X))
· BinProductPr2 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n)) (F X))
· (F_preserves_X · inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X)

        
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
IHn: ∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
# F (ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i) =
F_power_iso n
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
i': unit
# F
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
      C
      ⟦ sn_power_object C_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n), X ⟧)
     (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
      BinProductPr1 C
        (C_bin_products
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n) X)
      · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n) i')
     (λ _ : unit,
      BinProductPr2 C
        (C_bin_products
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n) X)) (inr i')) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products
     ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
           Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
             (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
         match
           n as n0
           return
             (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
         with
         | 0 =>
             Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
               (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty
         | S n0 =>
             n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products (F n0)
         end) n) X)
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
              Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
            match
              n as n0
              return
                (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
            with
            | 0 =>
                Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                  (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                  weqstn0toempty
            | S n0 =>
                n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                  (F n0)
            end) n)) (F X))
· BinProductPr2 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n)) (F X)) · identity (F X)

        
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ S n ⟧)%stn
IHn: ∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
# F (ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i) =
F_power_iso n
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
i': unit
# F
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn ⨿ unit,
      C
      ⟦ sn_power_object C_bin_products
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n), X ⟧)
     (λ i' : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
      BinProductPr1 C
        (C_bin_products
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n) X)
      · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n) i')
     (λ _ : unit,
      BinProductPr2 C
        (C_bin_products
           ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                 Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
               match
                 n as n0
                 return
                   (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                      (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
               with
               | 0 =>
                   Terminal_is_empty_product
                     C_terminal (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                     weqstn0toempty
               | S n0 =>
                   n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                     (F n0)
               end) n) X)) (inr i')) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products
     ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
           Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
             (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
         match
           n as n0
           return
             (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
         with
         | 0 =>
             Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
               (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty
         | S n0 =>
             n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products (F n0)
         end) n) X)
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
              Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
            match
              n as n0
              return
                (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                   (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
            with
            | 0 =>
                Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                  (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                  weqstn0toempty
            | S n0 =>
                n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                  (F n0)
            end) n)) (F X))
· BinProductPr2 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
                Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C
                  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X) :=
              match
                n as n0
                return
                  (Product (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn C
                     (λ _ : (⟦ n0 ⟧)%stn, X))
              with
              | 0 =>
                  Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty
              | S n0 =>
                  n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
                    (F n0)
              end) n)) (F X))

        exact (!BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ _ _ _ _).
  Qed.

  
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
Y: C
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
# F (ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f) =
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n)
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, # F (f i) · F_preserves_X)
· inv_from_z_iso (F_power_iso n)

  
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)

bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
Y: C
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
# F (ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f) =
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n)
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, # F (f i) · F_preserves_X)
· inv_from_z_iso (F_power_iso n)

    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)

  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
Y: C
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n)
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, # F (f i) · F_preserves_X) =
# F (ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f)
· F_power_iso n

    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
Y: C
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
∏ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn,
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n)
  (λ i0 : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, # F (f i0) · F_preserves_X)
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i =
# F (ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f)
· F_power_iso n
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i

    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
Y: C
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n)
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, # F (f i) · F_preserves_X)
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i =
# F (ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f)
· F_power_iso n
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i

    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
Y: C
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
# F (ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f)
· (F_power_iso n
   · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i) =
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n)
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, # F (f i) · F_preserves_X)
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i

    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
Y: C
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
# F (ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f)
· (# F (ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i)
   · F_preserves_X) =
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n)
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, # F (f i) · F_preserves_X)
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i

    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
Y: C
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
# F (ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f)
· # F (ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i)
· F_preserves_X =
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n)
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, # F (f i) · F_preserves_X)
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i

    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
Y: C
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
# F
  (ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) f
   · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (power n) i)
· F_preserves_X =
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n)
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, # F (f i) · F_preserves_X)
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i

    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
Y: C
f: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn → C ⟦ Y, X ⟧
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
ProductArrow (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n)
  (λ i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, # F (f i) · F_preserves_X)
· ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i =
# F (f i) · F_preserves_X

    exact (ProductPrCommutes _ _ _ _ _ _ _).
  Qed.

  Definition functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism_data
    : algebraic_theory_morphism_data L L'
    := λ _ f, inv_from_z_iso (F_power_iso _) · #F f · F_preserves_X.

  
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
is_algebraic_theory_morphism
  functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism_data

  
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X

app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory

  n: ∏ n : ℕ,

  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,

is_algebraic_theory_morphism
  functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism_data

    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
∏ (n : ℕ) (i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
mor_var_ax functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism_data n
  i
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
∏ (m n : ℕ) (f : L m) 
(g : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n),
mor_subst_ax functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism_data
  m n f g

    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
∏ (n : ℕ) (i : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn),
mor_var_ax functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism_data n
  i
 
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
mor_var_ax functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism_data n
  i

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
inv_from_z_iso (F_power_iso n)
· (F_power_iso n
   · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i
   · inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X) · F_preserves_X =
var i

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
inv_from_z_iso (F_power_iso n)
· (F_power_iso n
   · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i
   · inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X) =
var i · inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
n: ℕ
i: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
F_power_iso n · ProductPr (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C' (power' n) i
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X =
F_power_iso n · (var i · inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X)

      apply assoc'.
    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
∏ (m n : ℕ) (f : L m) (g : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n),
mor_subst_ax functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism_data
  m n f g
 
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
m, n: ℕ
f: L m
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n
mor_subst_ax functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism_data
  m n f g

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
m, n: ℕ
f: L m
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n
inv_from_z_iso (F_power_iso n)
· (# F (subst f g) · F_preserves_X) =
subst (functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism_data m f)
  (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
   functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism_data n (g i))

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
m, n: ℕ
f: L m
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n
# F (subst f g) · F_preserves_X =
F_power_iso n
· subst
    (functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism_data m f)
    (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
     functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism_data n (g i))

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
m, n: ℕ
f: L m
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n
# F (subst f g) · F_preserves_X =
F_power_iso n
· ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C'
    (bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
       C'_bin_products m)
    (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
     functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism_data n (g i))
· (inv_from_z_iso (F_power_iso m) · # F f)
· F_preserves_X

  (ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C
     (bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
        m) g) =

· ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C'

C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
m, n: ℕ
f: L m
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n
ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C' (power' m)
  (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, # F (g i) · F_preserves_X)
· inv_from_z_iso (F_power_iso m) =
F_power_iso n
· ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C'
    (bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
       C'_bin_products m)
    (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
     functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism_data n (g i))
· inv_from_z_iso (F_power_iso m)

abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧

ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C' (power' m)

· ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C'

       C'_bin_products m)

C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F

  n: ∏ n : ℕ,

∏ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C' (power' m)
  (λ i0 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, # F (g i0) · F_preserves_X)
· ProductPr (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C' (power' m) i =
F_power_iso n
· ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C'
    (bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
       C'_bin_products m)
    (λ i0 : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
     functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism_data n
       (g i0)) · ProductPr (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C' (power' m) i

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
m, n: ℕ
f: L m
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C' (power' m)
  (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn, # F (g i) · F_preserves_X)
· ProductPr (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C' (power' m) i =
F_power_iso n
· ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C'
    (bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
       C'_bin_products m)
    (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
     functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism_data n (g i))
· ProductPr (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C' (power' m) i

C'_terminal: Terminal C'

X': C'

  n: ∏ n : ℕ,

  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
m, n: ℕ
f: L m
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
F_power_iso n
· ProductArrow (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C'
    (bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
       C'_bin_products m)
    (λ i : (⟦ m ⟧)%stn,
     functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism_data n (g i))
· ProductPr (⟦ m ⟧)%stn C' (power' m) i =
# F (g i) · F_preserves_X

C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')

f: L m
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
F_power_iso n
· (inv_from_z_iso (F_power_iso n) · # F (g i))
· F_preserves_X = # F (g i) · F_preserves_X

C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C

C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'

app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧

· # F (g i) · F_preserves_X =
