C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
m, n: ℕ
f: L m
g: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn → L n
i: (⟦ m ⟧)%stn
identity (F (power n)) · # F (g i) · F_preserves_X =
# F (g i) · F_preserves_X

      exact (maponpaths (λ x, x · _) (id_left _)).
  Qed.

  Definition functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism
    : algebraic_theory_morphism L L'
    := make_algebraic_theory_morphism _ functor_to_is_algebraic_theory_morphism.

  Context (F_preserves_E : z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')).
  Context (F_preserves_φ_adj_inv
    : #F (exp_app_alt E app)
    = preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso _ F_preserves_binproduct (C_bin_products _ _) (C'_bin_products _ _)
      · binproduct_of_z_iso _ _ F_preserves_X F_preserves_X
      · exp_app_alt E' app'
      · inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X).

  Context (F_preserves_φ_adj
    : #F (exp_lam_alt E (var (T := L) (● 0 : stn 1)%stn))
    = preserves_terminal_to_z_iso _ F_preserves_terminal C_terminal _
      · exp_lam_alt E' (var (T := L') (● 0 : stn 1)%stn)
      · inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E).

  Context (F_preserves_app_abs_abs
    : #F (exp_mor E (app · abs) · abs)
    = F_preserves_E
      · exp_mor E' (app' · abs') · abs'
      · inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X).

  
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
preserves_app' functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism

  
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
preserves_app' functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism

    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
LambdaTheories.app' L' =
functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism 2
  (# (constprod_functor2 C_bin_products X)
     (var (stnpr 0))
   · φ_adj_inv
       (pr2
          (is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable'
             C_bin_products X E)) app)

    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism 2
  (# (constprod_functor2 C_bin_products X)
     (var (stnpr 0))
   · φ_adj_inv
       (pr2
          (is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable'
             C_bin_products X E)) app) =
# (constprod_functor2 C'_bin_products X')
  (var (stnpr 0))
· φ_adj_inv
    (pr2
       (is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable'
          C'_bin_products X' E')) app'

    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
inv_from_z_iso (F_power_iso 2)
· (# F
     (# (constprod_functor2 C_bin_products X)
        (var (stnpr 0)))
   · # F
       (φ_adj_inv
          (pr2
             (is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable'
                C_bin_products X E)) app))
· F_preserves_X =
# (constprod_functor2 C'_bin_products X')
  (var (stnpr 0))
· φ_adj_inv
    (pr2
       (is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable'
          C'_bin_products X' E')) app'

  (exp_lam_alt E

· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E

  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
inv_from_z_iso (F_power_iso 2)
· (# F
     (# (constprod_functor2 C_bin_products X)
        (var (stnpr 0)))
   · # F
       (φ_adj_inv
          (pr2
             (is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable'
                C_bin_products X E)) app)) =
# (constprod_functor2 C'_bin_products X')
  (var (stnpr 0))
· φ_adj_inv
    (pr2
       (is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable'
          C'_bin_products X' E')) app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X

C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct

  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
# F
  (# (constprod_functor2 C_bin_products X)
     (var (stnpr 0)))
· (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     F_preserves_binproduct (C_bin_products X X)
     (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
   · binproduct_of_z_iso (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
       (C'_bin_products X' X') F_preserves_X
       F_preserves_X · exp_app_alt E' app'
   · inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X) =
F_power_iso 2
· (# (constprod_functor2 C'_bin_products X')
     (var (stnpr 0))
   · φ_adj_inv
       (pr2
          (is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable'
             C'_bin_products X' E')) app'
   · inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X)

· abs'

    F_preserves_X
# F
  (# (constprod_functor2 C_bin_products X)
     (var (stnpr 0)))
· (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     F_preserves_binproduct (C_bin_products X X)
     (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
   · binproduct_of_z_iso (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))

       F_preserves_X · exp_app_alt E' app')
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X =
F_power_iso 2
· (# (constprod_functor2 C'_bin_products X')
     (var (stnpr 0))
   · φ_adj_inv

          (is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable'
             C'_bin_products X' E')) app')

· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)

· abs'

    F_preserves_X
# F
  (# (constprod_functor2 C_bin_products X)
     (var (stnpr 0)))
· (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F

     (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
   · binproduct_of_z_iso (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))

       F_preserves_X · exp_app_alt E' app') =

· (# (constprod_functor2 C'_bin_products X')
     (var (stnpr 0))
   · φ_adj_inv

          (is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable'

   · abs) =

    F_preserves_X
# F
  (# (constprod_functor2 C_bin_products X)
     (var (stnpr 0)))
· (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     F_preserves_binproduct (C_bin_products X X)
     (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
   · binproduct_of_z_iso (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
       (C'_bin_products X' X') F_preserves_X
       F_preserves_X) · exp_app_alt E' app' =
F_power_iso 2
· # (constprod_functor2 C'_bin_products X')
    (var (stnpr 0))
· φ_adj_inv
    (pr2
       (is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable'
          C'_bin_products X' E')) app'

    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
# F
  (# (constprod_functor2 C_bin_products X)
     (var (stnpr 0)))
· (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     F_preserves_binproduct (C_bin_products X X)
     (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
   · binproduct_of_z_iso (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
       (C'_bin_products X' X') F_preserves_X
       F_preserves_X) =
F_power_iso 2
· # (constprod_functor2 C'_bin_products X')
    (var (stnpr 0))

    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
BinProductArrow C' (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
  (# F
     (BinProductPr1 C
        (C_bin_products
           (functor_identity C
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1))
           (constant_functor C C X
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1)))
      · # (functor_identity C) (var (stnpr 0))))
  (# F
     (BinProductPr2 C
        (C_bin_products
           (functor_identity C
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1))
           (constant_functor C C X
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1)))
      · # (constant_functor C C X) (var (stnpr 0))))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
       F_preserves_binproduct (C_bin_products X X)
       (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X)))
· (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     F_preserves_binproduct (C_bin_products X X)
     (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
   · binproduct_of_z_iso (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
       (C'_bin_products X' X') F_preserves_X
       F_preserves_X) =
F_power_iso 2
· # (constprod_functor2 C'_bin_products X')
    (var (stnpr 0))

C_terminal: Terminal C

· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)

   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
BinProductArrow C' (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
  (# F
     (BinProductPr1 C
        (C_bin_products
           (functor_identity C
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1))
           (constant_functor C C X
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1)))
      · # (functor_identity C) (var (stnpr 0))))
  (# F
     (BinProductPr2 C
        (C_bin_products
           (functor_identity C
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1))
           (constant_functor C C X

    (var (stnpr 0))

C_terminal: Terminal C

E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧

· binproduct_of_z_iso

F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X

  (# F
     (BinProductPr1 C
        (C_bin_products
           (functor_identity C
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1))
           (constant_functor C C X
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1)))
      · # (functor_identity C) (var (stnpr 0))))
  (# F
     (BinProductPr2 C
        (C_bin_products
           (functor_identity C
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1))
           (constant_functor C C X
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1)))
      · # (constant_functor C C X) (var (stnpr 0))))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
        F_preserves_binproduct (C_bin_products X X)
        (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X)))
   · preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
       F_preserves_binproduct (C_bin_products X X)
       (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X)))
· binproduct_of_z_iso (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X') F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X =
F_power_iso 2
· # (constprod_functor2 C'_bin_products X')
    (var (stnpr 0))

    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
BinProductArrow C' (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
  (# F
     (BinProductPr1 C
        (C_bin_products
           (functor_identity C
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1))
           (constant_functor C C X
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1)))
      · # (functor_identity C) (var (stnpr 0))))
  (# F
     (BinProductPr2 C
        (C_bin_products
           (functor_identity C
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1))
           (constant_functor C C X
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1)))
      · # (constant_functor C C X) (var (stnpr 0))))
· identity (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X') F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X =
F_power_iso 2
· # (constprod_functor2 C'_bin_products X')
    (var (stnpr 0))

C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'

X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X

app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧

abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧

   · abs) =

· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X

  (# F
     (BinProductPr1 C
        (C_bin_products
           (functor_identity C
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1))
           (constant_functor C C X
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1)))
      · # (functor_identity C) (var (stnpr 0))))
  (# F
     (BinProductPr2 C
        (C_bin_products
           (functor_identity C
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1))
           (constant_functor C C X

                 C_bin_products 1)))
      · # (constant_functor C C X) (var (stnpr 0))))
· binproduct_of_z_iso (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X') F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X =

· # (constprod_functor2 C'_bin_products X')
    (var (stnpr 0))

    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X

E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧

C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F

power:= λ n : ℕ,

  n: ∏ n : ℕ,

power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
BinProductArrow C' (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
  (# F
     (BinProductPr1 C
        (C_bin_products
           (functor_identity C
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1))
           (constant_functor C C X
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1)))
      · # (functor_identity C) (var (stnpr 0))))
  (# F
     (BinProductPr2 C
        (C_bin_products
           (functor_identity C
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1))
           (constant_functor C C X
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1)))
      · # (constant_functor C C X) (var (stnpr 0))))
· (binproduct_of_z_iso (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
     (C'_bin_products X' X') F_preserves_X
     F_preserves_X
   · BinProductPr1 C' (C'_bin_products X' X')) =
F_power_iso 2
· (# (constprod_functor2 C'_bin_products X')
     (var (stnpr 0))
   · BinProductPr1 C' (C'_bin_products X' X'))
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
BinProductArrow C' (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
  (# F
     (BinProductPr1 C
        (C_bin_products
           (functor_identity C
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1))
           (constant_functor C C X
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1)))
      · # (functor_identity C) (var (stnpr 0))))
  (# F
     (BinProductPr2 C
        (C_bin_products
           (functor_identity C
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1))
           (constant_functor C C X
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1)))
      · # (constant_functor C C X) (var (stnpr 0))))
· (binproduct_of_z_iso 
     (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
     (C'_bin_products X' X') F_preserves_X
     F_preserves_X
   · BinProductPr2 C' (C'_bin_products X' X')) =
F_power_iso 2
· (# (constprod_functor2 C'_bin_products X')
     (var (stnpr 0))
   · BinProductPr2 C' (C'_bin_products X' X'))

    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')

    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
