  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
BinProductArrow C' (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
  (# F
     (BinProductPr1 C
        (C_bin_products
           (functor_identity C
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1))
           (constant_functor C C X
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1)))
      · # (functor_identity C) (var (stnpr 0))))
  (# F
     (BinProductPr2 C
        (C_bin_products
           (functor_identity C
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1))
           (constant_functor C C X
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1)))
      · # (constant_functor C C X) (var (stnpr 0))))
· (binproduct_of_z_iso (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
     (C'_bin_products X' X') F_preserves_X
     F_preserves_X
   · BinProductPr1 C' (C'_bin_products X' X')) =
F_power_iso 2
· (# (constprod_functor2 C'_bin_products X')
     (var (stnpr 0))
   · BinProductPr1 C' (C'_bin_products X' X'))
 
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
BinProductArrow C' (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
  (# F
     (BinProductPr1 C
        (C_bin_products
           (functor_identity C
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1))
           (constant_functor C C X
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1)))
      · # (functor_identity C) (var (stnpr 0))))
  (# F
     (BinProductPr2 C
        (C_bin_products
           (functor_identity C
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1))
           (constant_functor C C X
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1)))
      · # (constant_functor C C X) (var (stnpr 0))))
· (BinProductPr1 C' (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
   · F_preserves_X) =
F_power_iso 2
· (BinProductPr1 C'
     (C'_bin_products
        (n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty))
        X') · # (functor_identity C') (var (stnpr 0)))

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
BinProductArrow C' (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
  (# F
     (BinProductPr1 C
        (C_bin_products
           (functor_identity C
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1))
           (constant_functor C C X
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1)))
      · # (functor_identity C) (var (stnpr 0))))
  (# F
     (BinProductPr2 C
        (C_bin_products
           (functor_identity C
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1))
           (constant_functor C C X
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1)))
      · # (constant_functor C C X) (var (stnpr 0))))
· BinProductPr1 C' (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· F_preserves_X =
F_power_iso 2
· (BinProductPr1 C'
     (C'_bin_products
        (n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty))
        X') · # (functor_identity C') (var (stnpr 0)))

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
# F
  (BinProductPr1 C
     (C_bin_products
        (functor_identity C
           (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
              C_bin_products 1))
        (constant_functor C C X
           (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
              C_bin_products 1)))
   · # (functor_identity C) (var (stnpr 0)))
· F_preserves_X =
F_power_iso 2
· (BinProductPr1 C'
     (C'_bin_products
        (n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty))
        X') · # (functor_identity C') (var (stnpr 0)))

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
# F
  (BinProductPr1 C
     (C_bin_products
        (functor_identity C
           (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
              C_bin_products 1))
        (constant_functor C C X
           (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
              C_bin_products 1))))
· # F (# (functor_identity C) (var (stnpr 0)))
· F_preserves_X =
F_power_iso 2
· (BinProductPr1 C'
     (C'_bin_products
        (n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty))
        X') · # (functor_identity C') (var (stnpr 0)))

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products
     (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
        (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)) X)
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
     (F X))
· BinProductPr1 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
             (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
       (F X))
· # F (# (functor_identity C) (var (stnpr 0)))
· F_preserves_X =
F_power_iso 2
· (BinProductPr1 C'
     (C'_bin_products
        (n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty))
        X') · # (functor_identity C') (var (stnpr 0)))

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products
     (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
        (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)) X)
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
     (F X))
· BinProductPr1 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
             (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
       (F X))
· (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     F_preserves_binproduct
     (C_bin_products
        (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty) X)
     (C'_bin_products
        (F
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty))
        (F X))
   · BinProductPr2 C'
       (C'_bin_products
          (F
             (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty))
          (F X))) · F_preserves_X =
F_power_iso 2
· (BinProductPr1 C'
     (C'_bin_products
        (n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty))
        X') · # (functor_identity C') (var (stnpr 0)))

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
F_power_iso 2
· (BinProductPr1 C'
     (C'_bin_products
        (n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty))
        X') · # (functor_identity C') (var (stnpr 0))) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products
     (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
        (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)) X)
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
     (F X))
· BinProductPr1 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
             (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
       (F X))
· preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
    F_preserves_binproduct
    (C_bin_products
       (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
          (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty) X)
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty))
       (F X))
· BinProductPr2 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty))
       (F X)) · F_preserves_X

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
F_power_iso 2
· BinProductPr1 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
          (Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty))
       X') · # (functor_identity C') (var (stnpr 0)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products
     (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
        (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)) X)
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
     (F X))
· BinProductPr1 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
             (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
       (F X))
· preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
    F_preserves_binproduct
    (C_bin_products
       (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
          (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty) X)
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty))
       (F X))
· BinProductPr2 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty))
       (F X)) · F_preserves_X

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products
     (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
        (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)) X)
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
     (F X))
· (binproduct_of_z_iso
     (C'_bin_products
        (F
           (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
              (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                 (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
        (F X))
     (C'_bin_products
        (n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty))
        X')
     (z_iso_comp
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
           F_preserves_binproduct
           (C_bin_products
              (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                 (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)
              X)
           (C'_bin_products
              (F
                 (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty)) (F X)))
        (binproduct_of_z_iso
           (C'_bin_products
              (F
                 (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty)) (F X))
           (C'_bin_products
              (Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
                 (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X')
                 weqstn0toempty) X')
           (z_iso_Terminals
              (make_Terminal (F (pr1 C_terminal))
                 (F_preserves_terminal
                    (pr1 C_terminal) (pr2 C_terminal)))
              C'_terminal) F_preserves_X))
     F_preserves_X
   · BinProductPr1 C'
       (C'_bin_products
          (n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
             (Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
                (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty))
          X'))
· # (functor_identity C') (var (stnpr 0)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products
     (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
        (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)) X)
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
     (F X))
· BinProductPr1 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
             (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
       (F X))
· preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
    F_preserves_binproduct
    (C_bin_products
       (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
          (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty) X)
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty))
       (F X))
· BinProductPr2 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty))
       (F X)) · F_preserves_X

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products
     (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
        (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)) X)
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
     (F X))
· (BinProductPr1 C'
     (C'_bin_products
        (F
           (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
              (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                 (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
        (F X))
   · z_iso_comp
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          F_preserves_binproduct
          (C_bin_products
             (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)
             X)
          (C'_bin_products
             (F
                (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                   (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                   weqstn0toempty)) (F X)))
       (binproduct_of_z_iso
          (C'_bin_products
             (F
                (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                   (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                   weqstn0toempty)) (F X))
          (C'_bin_products
             (Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
                (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty)
             X')
          (z_iso_Terminals
             (make_Terminal (F (pr1 C_terminal))
                (F_preserves_terminal (pr1 C_terminal)
                   (pr2 C_terminal))) C'_terminal)
          F_preserves_X))
· # (functor_identity C') (var (stnpr 0)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products
     (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
        (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)) X)
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
     (F X))
· BinProductPr1 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
             (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
       (F X))
· preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
    F_preserves_binproduct
    (C_bin_products
       (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
          (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty) X)
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty))
       (F X))
· BinProductPr2 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty))
       (F X)) · F_preserves_X

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products
     (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
        (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)) X)
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
     (F X))
· BinProductPr1 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
             (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
       (F X))
· preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
    F_preserves_binproduct
    (C_bin_products
       (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
          (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty) X)
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty))
       (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty))
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products
       (Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
          (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty) X')
    (z_iso_Terminals
       (make_Terminal (F (pr1 C_terminal))
          (F_preserves_terminal (pr1 C_terminal)
             (pr2 C_terminal))) C'_terminal)
    F_preserves_X
· # (functor_identity C') (var (stnpr 0)) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products
     (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
        (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)) X)
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
     (F X))
· BinProductPr1 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
             (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
       (F X))
· preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
    F_preserves_binproduct
    (C_bin_products
       (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
          (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty) X)
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty))
       (F X))
· BinProductPr2 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty))
       (F X)) · F_preserves_X

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products
     (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
        (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)) X)
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
     (F X))
· BinProductPr1 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
             (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
       (F X))
· preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
    F_preserves_binproduct
    (C_bin_products
       (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
          (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty) X)
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty))
       (F X))
· (binproduct_of_z_iso
     (C'_bin_products
        (F
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty))
        (F X))
     (C'_bin_products
        (Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty) X')
     (z_iso_Terminals
        (make_Terminal (F (pr1 C_terminal))
           (F_preserves_terminal (pr1 C_terminal)
              (pr2 C_terminal))) C'_terminal)
     F_preserves_X
   · # (functor_identity C') (var (stnpr 0))) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products
     (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
        (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)) X)
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
     (F X))
· BinProductPr1 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
             (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
       (F X))
· preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
    F_preserves_binproduct
    (C_bin_products
       (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
          (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty) X)
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty))
       (F X))
· BinProductPr2 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty))
       (F X)) · F_preserves_X

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products
     (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
        (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)) X)
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
     (F X))
· BinProductPr1 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
             (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
       (F X))
· preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
    F_preserves_binproduct
    (C_bin_products
       (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
          (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty) X)
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty))
       (F X))
· (BinProductPr2 C'
     (C'_bin_products
        (F
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty))
        (F X)) · F_preserves_X) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products
     (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
        (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)) X)
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
     (F X))
· BinProductPr1 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
             (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
       (F X))
· preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
    F_preserves_binproduct
    (C_bin_products
       (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
          (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty) X)
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty))
       (F X))
· BinProductPr2 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty))
       (F X)) · F_preserves_X

      exact (assoc _ _ _).
    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
BinProductArrow C' (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
  (# F
     (BinProductPr1 C
        (C_bin_products
           (functor_identity C
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1))
           (constant_functor C C X
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1)))
      · # (functor_identity C) (var (stnpr 0))))
  (# F
     (BinProductPr2 C
        (C_bin_products
           (functor_identity C
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1))
           (constant_functor C C X
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1)))
      · # (constant_functor C C X) (var (stnpr 0))))
· (binproduct_of_z_iso (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
     (C'_bin_products X' X') F_preserves_X
     F_preserves_X
   · BinProductPr2 C' (C'_bin_products X' X')) =
F_power_iso 2
· (# (constprod_functor2 C'_bin_products X')
     (var (stnpr 0))
   · BinProductPr2 C' (C'_bin_products X' X'))
 
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
BinProductArrow C' (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
  (# F
     (BinProductPr1 C
        (C_bin_products
           (functor_identity C
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1))
           (constant_functor C C X
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1)))
      · # (functor_identity C) (var (stnpr 0))))
  (# F
     (BinProductPr2 C
        (C_bin_products
           (functor_identity C
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1))
           (constant_functor C C X
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1)))
      · # (constant_functor C C X) (var (stnpr 0))))
· (BinProductPr2 C' (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
   · F_preserves_X) =
F_power_iso 2
· (BinProductPr2 C'
     (C'_bin_products
        (n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty))
        X')
   · # (constant_functor C' C' X') (var (stnpr 0)))

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X

E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')

  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory

  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'

power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)

bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,

  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct

  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')

    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'

  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var

· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
BinProductArrow C' (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
  (# F
     (BinProductPr1 C
        (C_bin_products
           (functor_identity C
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1))
           (constant_functor C C X
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1)))
      · # (functor_identity C) (var (stnpr 0))))
  (# F
     (BinProductPr2 C
        (C_bin_products
           (functor_identity C
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1))
           (constant_functor C C X
              (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
                 C_bin_products 1)))
      · # (constant_functor C C X) (var (stnpr 0))))
· BinProductPr2 C' (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· F_preserves_X =
F_power_iso 2
· (BinProductPr2 C'
     (C'_bin_products
        (n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty))
        X')
   · # (constant_functor C' C' X') (var (stnpr 0)))

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧

abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧

F: C ⟶ C'

  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)

  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,

· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))

    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F

· exp_lam_alt E'

F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
# F
  (BinProductPr2 C
     (C_bin_products
        (functor_identity C
           (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
              C_bin_products 1))
        (constant_functor C C X
           (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
              C_bin_products 1)))
   · # (constant_functor C C X) (var (stnpr 0)))
· F_preserves_X =
F_power_iso 2
· (BinProductPr2 C'
     (C'_bin_products
        (n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty))
        X')
   · # (constant_functor C' C' X') (var (stnpr 0)))

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
# F
  (BinProductPr2 C
     (C_bin_products
        (functor_identity C
           (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
              C_bin_products 1))
        (constant_functor C C X
           (bin_product_power C X C_terminal
              C_bin_products 1))))
· # F (# (constant_functor C C X) (var (stnpr 0)))
· F_preserves_X =
F_power_iso 2
· (BinProductPr2 C'
     (C'_bin_products
        (n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty))
        X')
   · # (constant_functor C' C' X') (var (stnpr 0)))

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products
     (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
        (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)) X)
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
     (F X))
· BinProductPr2 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
             (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
       (F X))
· # F (# (constant_functor C C X) (var (stnpr 0)))
· F_preserves_X =
F_power_iso 2
· (BinProductPr2 C'
     (C'_bin_products
        (n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty))
        X')
   · # (constant_functor C' C' X') (var (stnpr 0)))

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products
     (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
        (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)) X)
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
     (F X))
· BinProductPr2 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
             (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
       (F X)) · identity (F X) · F_preserves_X =
F_power_iso 2
· (BinProductPr2 C'
     (C'_bin_products
        (n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty))
        X')
   · # (constant_functor C' C' X') (var (stnpr 0)))

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
F_power_iso 2
· (BinProductPr2 C'
     (C'_bin_products
        (n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty))
        X')
   · # (constant_functor C' C' X') (var (stnpr 0))) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products
     (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
        (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)) X)
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
     (F X))
· BinProductPr2 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
             (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
       (F X)) · F_preserves_X

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
F_power_iso 2
· BinProductPr2 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
          (Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
             (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty))
       X') =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products
     (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
        (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)) X)
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
     (F X))
· BinProductPr2 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
             (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
       (F X)) · F_preserves_X

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products
     (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
        (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)) X)
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
     (F X))
· (binproduct_of_z_iso
     (C'_bin_products
        (F
           (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
              (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                 (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
        (F X))
     (C'_bin_products
        (n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty))
        X')
     (z_iso_comp
        (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
           F_preserves_binproduct
           (C_bin_products
              (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                 (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)
              X)
           (C'_bin_products
              (F
                 (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty)) (F X)))
        (binproduct_of_z_iso
           (C'_bin_products
              (F
                 (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                    (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X)
                    weqstn0toempty)) (F X))
           (C'_bin_products
              (Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
                 (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X')
                 weqstn0toempty) X')
           (z_iso_Terminals
              (make_Terminal (F (pr1 C_terminal))
                 (F_preserves_terminal
                    (pr1 C_terminal) (pr2 C_terminal)))
              C'_terminal) F_preserves_X))
     F_preserves_X
   · BinProductPr2 C'
       (C'_bin_products
          (n_power_to_sn_power C'_bin_products
             (Terminal_is_empty_product C'_terminal
                (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X') weqstn0toempty))
          X')) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products
     (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
        (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)) X)
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
     (F X))
· BinProductPr2 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
             (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
       (F X)) · F_preserves_X

      
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products
     (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
        (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)) X)
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
     (F X))
· (BinProductPr2 C'
     (C'_bin_products
        (F
           (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
              (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                 (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
        (F X)) · F_preserves_X) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products
     (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
        (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
           (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)) X)
  (C'_bin_products
     (F
        (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
           (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
              (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
     (F X))
· BinProductPr2 C'
    (C'_bin_products
       (F
          (n_power_to_sn_power C_bin_products
             (Terminal_is_empty_product C_terminal
                (λ _ : (⟦ 0 ⟧)%stn, X) weqstn0toempty)))
       (F X)) · F_preserves_X

      exact (assoc _ _ _).
  Qed.

  
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
preserves_one functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism

  
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X

  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))

· exp_app_alt E' app'

  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
