F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
preserves_one functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism

    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism 0
  (exp_lam_alt E (var (stnpr 0) · app · abs) · abs) =
one L'

    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X

app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F

bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism 0
  (exp_lam_alt E (var (stnpr 0) · (app · abs)) · abs) =
one L'

    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧

E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧

L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F

Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)

bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso

  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)

· exp_app_alt E' app'

F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var

· exp_lam_alt E'

· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism 0
  (φ_adj
     (pr2
        (is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable'
           C_bin_products X E)) (var (stnpr 0))
   · # (pr1 E) (app · abs) · abs) = one L'

C_terminal: Terminal C

inv_from_z_iso (F_power_iso 0)
· (# F
     (φ_adj

           (is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable'
              C_bin_products X E)) (var (stnpr 0)))
   · # F (# (pr1 E) (app · abs) · abs))

F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
exp_lam_alt E' (var (stnpr 0) · (app' · abs')) · abs' =
inv_from_z_iso (F_power_iso 0)
· (preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F F_preserves_terminal
     C_terminal C'_terminal
   · exp_lam_alt E' (var (stnpr 0))
   · inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
   · # F (# (pr1 E) (app · abs) · abs) · F_preserves_X)

    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
inv_from_z_iso (F_power_iso 0)
· (preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F F_preserves_terminal
     C_terminal C'_terminal
   · exp_lam_alt E' (var (stnpr 0))
   · inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
   · # F (# (pr1 E) (app · abs) · abs) · F_preserves_X) =
φ_adj
  (pr2
     (is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable'
        C'_bin_products X' E')) (var (stnpr 0))
· # (pr1 E') (app' · abs') · abs'

    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F F_preserves_terminal
  C_terminal C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E' (var (stnpr 0))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
· # F (# (pr1 E) (app · abs) · abs) · F_preserves_X =
F_power_iso 0
· (φ_adj
     (pr2
        (is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable'
           C'_bin_products X' E')) (var (stnpr 0))
   · # (pr1 E') (app' · abs') · abs')

C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C

   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'

    F_preserves_X
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F F_preserves_terminal
  C_terminal C'_terminal
· (exp_lam_alt E' (var (stnpr 0))
   · (inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
      · (# F (# (pr1 E) (app · abs) · abs)

F_power_iso 0

        (is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable'
           C'_bin_products X' E')) (var (stnpr 0))
   · # (pr1 E') (app' · abs') · abs')

· (# F (# (pr1 E) (app · abs) · abs) · F_preserves_X) =
# (pr1 E') (app' · abs') · abs'

  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
# F (# (pr1 E) (app · abs) · abs) · F_preserves_X =
F_preserves_E · # (pr1 E') (app' · abs') · abs'

    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
# F (# (pr1 E) (app · abs) · abs) =
F_preserves_E · # (pr1 E') (app' · abs') · abs'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X

    apply F_preserves_app_abs_abs.
  Qed.

  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,

F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =

  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)

  (exp_lam_alt E

· exp_lam_alt E'

· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E

  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
is_lambda_theory_morphism
  functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism

  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
abs · app = identity (exp E X)

      exact C_beta.
    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
has_β L'
 
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')

      exact C'_beta.
    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')

    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F

· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
preserves_app' functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism
 exact functor_to_morphism_preserves_app'.
    
C, C': category
C_terminal: Terminal C
C_bin_products: BinProducts C
X: C
C'_terminal: Terminal C'
C'_bin_products: BinProducts C'
X': C'
E: is_exponentiable C_bin_products X
abs: C ⟦ exp E X, X ⟧
app: C ⟦ X, exp E X ⟧
C_beta: abs · app = identity (exp E X)
E': is_exponentiable C'_bin_products X'
abs': C' ⟦ exp E' X', X' ⟧
app': C' ⟦ X', exp E' X' ⟧
C'_beta: abs' · app' = identity (exp E' X')
L:= endomorphism_lambda_theory C_terminal
  C_bin_products X E abs app: lambda_theory
L':= endomorphism_lambda_theory C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products X' E' abs' app': lambda_theory
F: C ⟶ C'
F_preserves_X: z_iso (F X) X'
F_preserves_terminal: preserves_terminal F
F_preserves_binproduct: preserves_binproduct F
power:= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C X C_terminal C_bin_products
  n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X)
power':= λ n : ℕ,
bin_product_power C' X' C'_terminal
  C'_bin_products n: ∏ n : ℕ,
Product (⟦ n ⟧)%stn C'
  (λ _ : (⟦ n ⟧)%stn, X')
F_preserves_E: z_iso (F (exp E X)) (exp E' X')
F_preserves_φ_adj_inv: # F (exp_app_alt E app) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso
  F F_preserves_binproduct
  (C_bin_products X X)
  (C'_bin_products (F X) (F X))
· binproduct_of_z_iso
    (C'_bin_products (F X)
       (F X))
    (C'_bin_products X' X')
    F_preserves_X
    F_preserves_X
· exp_app_alt E' app'
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_X
F_preserves_φ_adj: # F
  (exp_lam_alt E
     (var
        ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))) =
preserves_terminal_to_z_iso F
  F_preserves_terminal C_terminal
  C'_terminal
· exp_lam_alt E'
    (var ((● 0)%stn : (⟦ 1 ⟧)%stn))
· inv_from_z_iso F_preserves_E
F_preserves_app_abs_abs: # F
  (exp_mor E (app · abs)
   · abs) =
F_preserves_E
· exp_mor E' (app' · abs')
· abs'
· inv_from_z_iso
    F_preserves_X
preserves_one functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism
 exact functor_to_morphism_preserves_one.
  Qed.

  Definition functor_to_lambda_theory_morphism
    : lambda_theory_morphism L L'
    := make_lambda_theory_morphism
      functor_to_algebraic_theory_morphism
      functor_to_is_lambda_theory_morphism.

End Morphism.
